Returning 1st Generation monsters are &#160; Aptonoth , &#160; Gravios , &#160; Gypceros , &#160; Rathalos , &#160; Rathian , &#160; Yian Kut-Ku and &#160; Vespoid . Returning 2nd Generation monsters are &#160; Blango , &#160; Blangonga , &#160; Conga and &#160; Congalala . Returning 3rd Generation monster is &#160; Lagiacrus . Returning 4th Generation monsters are &#160; Gogmazios , &#160; Gore Magala , &#160; Mizutsune , &#160; Nerscylla and &#160; Seregios . No returning monster from 5th Generation. There are monsters in the game that can't be hunted, Aptonoth who are in some Base Camps, Seikret , Mernos and Wudwuds . Mizutsune was added in Monster Hunter Wilds' first title update. Lagiacrus and Seregios were added in Monster Hunter Wilds' second title update. Gogmazios was added in Monster Hunter Wilds' fourth title udpate 35 new monsters ; 15 Small monsters and 20 Large monsters. 2 new Amphibians: &#160; Chatacabra and &#160; Gelidron . 4 new Bird Wyverns: &#160; Kranodath , &#160; Porkeplume , &#160; Talioth and &#160; Seikret . 2 new Brute Wyverns: &#160; Quematrice and &#160; Rompopolo . 2 new Cephalopods: &#160; Nu Udra , &#160; Xu Wu . 7 new Constructs: &#160; # MHWilds: Weapons

MHWilds: Weapons ・ MHWilds: Armors ・ MHWilds: Monsters ・ MHWilds: Monster Material List ・ MHWilds: Palico Gear ・ MHWilds: Locations ・ MHWilds: Skills ・ MHWilds: Item List ・ MHWilds: Assigned Quests ・ MHWilds: Optional Quests ・ MHWilds: Event Quests ・ MHWilds: Endemic Life List ・ MHWilds: Decorations ・ MHWilds: Charm List Notes: Weapon Names in italics can be crafted from the Forge Weapons menu. Weapon Names in bold are the final upgrade/s to that Weapon's path. To craft the first weapon of a given Weapon Tree, you must first craft or purchase the weapon that leads into its Weapon Tree. Click on the Weapon's Name for more detailed information about the Weapon, including Creation / Upgrade Materials, Costs, Skills, other stats, and Japanese Name Equivalents. Great Sword , Long Sword , Sword and Shield , Dual Blades , Hammer , Hunting Horn , Lance , Gunlance , Switch Axe , Charge Blade , Insect Glaive , Light Bowgun , Heavy Bowgun , and Bow .

# MHWilds: Skills

MHWilds: Weapons ・ MHWilds: Armors ・ MHWilds: Monsters ・ MHWilds: Monster Material List ・ MHWilds: Palico Gear ・ MHWilds: Locations ・ MHWilds: Skills ・ MHWilds: Item List ・ MHWilds: Assigned Quests ・ MHWilds: Optional Quests ・ MHWilds: Event Quests ・ MHWilds: Endemic Life List ・ MHWilds: Decorations ・ MHWilds: Charm List Skill List [ ] Weapon Skills [ ] Skill Tree Description Level Effect Airborne 飛燕 Increases the damage caused by jumping attacks. 1 Jumping attack power +10%. Artillery 砲術 Strengthens explosive attacks like shells, Wyvern's Fire, charge blade phial attacks, and Sticky Ammo. 1 Moderately increases each attack and Wyvern Fire's firing speed. Shelling fire attack +30. 2 Increases each attack and Wyvern Fire's firing speed. Shelling fire attack +60. 3 Greatly increases each attack and Wyvern Fire's firing speed. Shelling fire attack +90. Attack Boost 攻撃 Increases attack power. 1 Attack +3 2 Attack +5 3 Attack +7 4 Attack +2% Bonus: +8 5 Attack +4% Bonus: +9 Ballistics 弾導強化 Extends the range in which ammo and arrows have maximum power. 1 Slightly extends range. 2 Extends range. 3 Greatly extends range. Bladescale Honing 刃鱗研装 Narrowly evading a monster's attack while your weapon is drawn grants special sharpness. 1 Activates skill effect. Bladescale Loading 刃鱗増装 Narrowly evading a monster's attack while your weapon is drawn grants special loaded ammo or applied coatings. 1 Activates skill effect. Blast Attack 爆破属性強化 Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.) 1 Blast buildup +5% Bonus: +10 2 Blast buildup +10% Bonus: +10 3 Blast buildup +20% Bonus: +10 Blast Functionality 爆破ビン追加 Allows you to apply blast coatings. 1 Lets you use blast coating. Bludgeoner 鈍器使い Increases attack power when your weapon sharpness is low. 1 +5% attack power when your weapon sharpness is yellow or lower. 2 +10% attack power when your weapon sharpness is yellow or lower. 3 +10% attack power when your weapon sharpness is green or lower. Catburglar にゃんにゃんぼう Grants a small chance of obtaining various items when landing critical hits. 1 Activates skill effect. Charge Up 溜打強化 Increases your power to induce stun when you hit a monster with a hammer's charged attack. 1 Activates skill effect. Charge Master チャージマスター Increases element and status buildup when landing a charged attack. 1 Slightly increases element and status buildup. 2 Increases element and status buildup. 3 Greatly increases element and status buildup. Convert Thunder Resistance 耐性変換【雷】 Increase to your weapon's elemental attack proportional to your thunder resistance. 1 Activates skill effect. (+5 element attack for every 1 Thunder Res) Crackling Cornpopper 焼き砲モロコシ Increases shelling power and fire attack while overheated. 1 Activates skill effect. Critical Boost 超会心 Increases the damage of critical hits. 1 Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 28%. 2 Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 31%. 3 Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 34%. 4 Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 37%. 5 Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%. Critical Draw 抜刀術【技】 Increases affinity when performing draw attacks. (Not effective while riding.) 1 Affinity +50% 2 Affinity +75% 3 Affinity +100% Critical Element 会心撃【属性】 Increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits. 1 Slightly increases elemental damage while active. 2 Increases elemental damage while active. 3 Greatly increases elemental damage while active. Critical Eye 見切り Increases affinity. 1 Affinity +4% 2 Affinity +8% 3 Affinity +12% 4 Affinity +16% 5 Affinity +20% Critical Status 会心撃【特殊】 Increases abnormal status effects (paralysis, poison, sleep, blast) when landing critical hits. 1 Slightly increases abnormal status effects when landing critical hits. 2 Increases abnormal status effects when landing critical hits. 3 Greatly increases abnormal status effects when landing critical hits. Darkside 暗黒 Performing certain Lvl 2 or higher charged slashes temporarily increases attack but also deals self-damage. 1 Activates skill effect. (Requires activation cooldown, but self-damage still occurs.) (Attack +10% while active. Effect lasts 30s and can be triggered again 15s after expiring) Dragon Attack 龍属性攻撃強化 Increases dragon element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.) 1 Dragon attack +40 2 Dragon attack +10% Bonus: +50 3 Dragon attack +20% Bonus: +60 Evading Reload 回避装模 Evading loads the currently selected ammo automatically. 1 Activates skill effect. Exhaust Functionality 減気ビン追加 Allows you to apply exhaust coatings. 1 Lets you use exhaust coatings. Fire Attack 火属性攻撃強化 Increases fire element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.) 1 Fire attack +40 2 Fire attack +10% Bonus: +50 3 Fire attack +20% Bonus: +60 Focus 集中 Increases the fill rate for weapons with gauges and the charge rate for weapons with charge attacks. 1 Slightly increases gauge fill rate and reduces charge times by 5%. 2 Moderately gauge fill rate and reduces charge times by 10%. 3 Increases gauge fill rate and reduces charge times by 15%. Grillmaster 炎の料理人 Grill meat to sharpen your weapon and temporarily increase your attack. (Duration and effect vary based on results.) 1 Activates skill effect. Rare Steak: Fire attack +100 and affinity +10% for 90s Well-done Steak: Fire attack +300 and affinity +10% for 300s Burnt Meat: Fire attack +300 for 150s Guard ガード性能 Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding. 1 Slightly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%. 2 Decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 30%. 3 Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Guard Up ガード強化 Reduces damage taken when guarding and allows you to guard against ordinarily unblockable attacks. 1 Reduces damage taken by 10%, plus an additional 20% when conditions are met. 2 Reduces damage taken by 20%, plus an additional 30% when conditions are met. 3 Reduces damage taken by 30%, plus an additional 50% when conditions are met. Handicraft 匠 Extends the weapon sharpness gauge. However, it will not increase the gauge past its maximum. 1 Weapon sharpness +10 2 Weapon sharpness +20 3 Weapon sharpness +30 4 Weapon sharpness +40 5 Weapon sharpness +50 Horn Maestro 笛吹き名人 Increases the effect duration of hunting horn melodies. (Effect lost when you change weapons.) 1 Extends melody effect duration and increases the chance of larger heals from healing melodies. 2 Greatly increases the effect duration of hunting horn melodies. Ice Attack 氷属性攻撃強化 Increases ice element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.) 1 Ice attack +40 2 Ice attack +10% Bonus: +50 3 Ice attack +20% Bonus: +60 Load Shells 砲弾装填 Improves reloading, and increases the gunlance's shell capacity and charge blade's phial capacity. 1 Increases shell and phial reloading speed. 2 Increases shell/phial reloading speed. Gunlance loading capacity +1. Charge blade charges 5 phials on yellow gauge. Master's Touch 達人芸 Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness during critical hits. 1 Grants an 80% chance of no sharpness loss while active. Mind's Eye 心眼 Your attacks are deflected less and deal more damage to hard targets. 1 50% chance of your attacks not being deflected, 10% damage to hard targets. 2 100% chance of your attacks not being deflected, 15% damage to hard targets. 3 100% chance of your attacks not being deflected, 30% damage to hard targets. Normal Shots 通常弾・通常矢強化 Increases the attack power of Normal Ammo and normal arrows, and Flying Swallow Shot. 1 Slightly increases the power of specified ammo and arrows. Offensive Guard 攻めの守勢 Temporarily increases attack power after executing a perfectly-timed guard. 1 Attack +5% while active. 2 Attack +10% while active. 3 Attack +15% while active. Opening Shot ファーストショット Increases the bowgun's reload speed and increases the power of bullets when fully loaded. 1 Moderately increases bowgun reload speed and attack power of ammo when conditions are met. 2 Increases bowgun reload speed and attack power of ammo when conditions are met. 3 Greatly increases bowgun reload speed and attack power of ammo when conditions are met. Paralysis Attack 麻痺属性強化 Increases the rate of paralysis buildup. (Paralysis buildup has a maximum limit.) 1 Paralysis buildup +5% Bonus: +10 2 Paralysis buildup +10% Bonus: +20 3 Paralysis buildup +20% Bonus: +50 Para Functionality 麻痺ビン追加 Allows you to apply paralysis coatings. 1 Lets you use paralysis coatings. Piercing Shots 貫通弾・竜の矢強化 Increases the attack power of Pierce Ammo, Dragon Piercer, and Thousand Dragons. 1 Slightly increases the power of specified ammo and arrows. Poison Attack 毒属性強化 Increases the rate of poison buildup. (Poison buildup has a maximum limit.) 1 Poison buildup +5% Bonus: +10 2 Poison buildup +10% Bonus: +20 3 Poison buildup +20% Bonus: +50 Poison Duration Up 毒ダメージ強化 Extends the duration of your poison's effect on monsters. 1 Extends the duration of your poison's effect by 20%. Poison Functionality 毒ビン追加 Allows you to apply poison coatings. 1 Lets you use poison coatings. Power Prolonger 強化持続 Allows long swords, dual blades, insect glaives, switch axes, and charge blades to stay powered up longer. 1 Moderately boosts the duration weapons are powered up. 2 Boosts the duration weapons are powered up. 3 Greatly boosts the duration weapons are powered up. Power Stone パワーストーン Temporarily increases attack upon mining materials. 1 Mining particularly rare materials greatly increases attack. (Attack increase has a maximum limit.) (Max +90 attack. Lasts 90s) Iron Ore, Machalite Ore, Dragonite Ore, Earth Crystal, Firestone: +10 Lightcrystal, Carbalite Ore, Fucium Ore, Gracium, Firecell Stone: +15 Novacrystal: +30 Protective Polish 剛刃研磨 Weapon sharpness does not decrease for a set time after sharpening. 1 Grants no sharpness loss for 30 seconds after activation. 2 Grants no sharpness loss for 60 seconds after activation. 3 Grants no sharpness loss for 90 seconds after activation. Punishing Draw 抜刀術【力】 Adds a stun effect to draw attacks and slightly increases attack power. (Not effective while riding.) 1 Draw attacks deal a small amount of stun damage and gain +3 attack. 2 Draw attacks deal a medium amount of stun damage and gain +5 attack. 3 Draw attacks deal a large amount of stun damage and gain +7 attack. Rapid Fire Up 連射強化 Improves light bowgun rapid fire. 1 Rapid fire power +5% Rapid Morph 高速変形 Increases switch speed and power for switch axe and charge blades. 1 Speed +10% 2 Speed +20%, morph attack damage +10% 3 Speed +30%, morph attack damage +20% Razor Sharp 業物 Prevents your weapon from losing sharpness. 1 Grants a 10% of chance of no sharpness loss. 2 Grants a 25% of chance of no sharpness loss. 3 Grants a 50% of chance of no sharpness loss. Shattering Reflection (?) Level 3 charged slashes deal area-of-effect damage upon hitting the ground. 1 Activates skill effect. Sleep Attack 睡眠属性強化 Increases the rate of sleep buildup. (Sleep buildup has a maximum limit.) 1 Sleep buildup +5% Bonus: +10 2 Sleep buildup +10% Bonus: +20 3 Sleep buildup +20% Bonus: +50 Sleep Functionality 睡眠ビン追加 Allows you to apply sleep coatings. 1 Lets you use sleep coatings. Slicked Blade 濡れ刃紋 Temporarily increases affinity when wet or when afflicted with bubbleblight. (Wet and bubbleblight effects stack.) 1 Affinity +3% when wet, and +7% while afflicted with bubbleblight. 2 Affinity +6% when wet, and +14% while afflicted with bubbleblight. 3 Affinity +9% when wet, and +21% while afflicted with bubbleblight. Slugger KO術 Makes it easier to stun monsters. 1 Stun power +20% 2 Stun power +30% 3 Stun power +40% Special Ammo Boost 特殊射撃強化 Increases the power of the bowgun's special ammo, and the bow's Dragon Piercer, Thousand Dragons, and Tracer. 1 Moderately increases the power of specified ammo and arrows. 2 Increases the power of specified ammo and arrows. Speed Sharpening 砥石使用高速化 Speeds up weapon sharpening when using a whetstone. 1 Removes one cycle from the sharpening process. 2 Removes two cycles from the sharpening process. Spread/Power Shots 散弾・剛射強化 Increases the attack power of Spread Ammo and the bow's Power Shot and Quick Shots. 1 Slightly increases the power of specified ammo and arrows. Stamina Thief スタミナ奪取 Increases certain attacks' ability to exhaust monsters. 1 Exhaust power +20% 2 Exhaust power +30% 3 Exhaust power +40% Synergy 連携プログラム Temporarily increases your affinity and the affinity of those around you after using a Rising Spiral Slash. 1 Activates skill effect. Synthetic Shield シールドオプション Temporarily increases your defense and the defense of those around you after a successful Perfect Guard. 1 Activates skill effect. Tetrad Shot フォースショット Increases affinity of bowguns ammo/coatings from the fourth shot and attack of the fourth and sixth shots. 1 Slightly increases the attack power and affinity of ammo after certain conditions are met. 2 Moderately increases the attack power and affinity of ammo after certain conditions are met. 3 Increases the attack power and affinity of ammo after certain conditions are met. Thunder Attack 雷属性攻撃強化 Increases thunder element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.) 1 Thunder attack +40 2 Thunder attack +10% Bonus: +50 3 Thunder attack +20% Bonus: +60 Water Attack 水属性攻撃強化 Increases water element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.) 1 Water attack +40 2 Water attack +10% Bonus: +50 3 Water attack +20% Bonus: +60 Whiteflame Torrent 白熾の奔流 Chance to deal additional damage after landing an attack. 1 Activates skill effect. (When used with Scorcher, does not stack but adds extra fire damage.) Armor Skills [ ] Skill Tree Description Level Effect Adaptability 環境適応 Grants protection against environmental damage, such as from heat or cold. 1 Negates the effects of heat and cold. 2 Negates environmental damage. Adrenaline Rush 巧撃 Temporarily increases attack power after executing a perfectly-timed evade just as a monster attacks. 1 Attack +10 while active. (Effect lasts 30s and cannot trigger again while active) 2 Attack +15 while active. 3 Attack +20 while active. 4 Attack +25 while active. 5 Attack +30 while active. Agitator 挑戦者 Increases attack power and affinity when large monsters become enraged. 1 Attack +4 and affinity +3% while active. 2 Attack +8 and affinity +5% while active. 3 Attack +12 and affinity +7% while active. 4 Attack +16 and affinity +10% while active. 5 Attack +20 and affinity +15% while active. Ambush 急襲 Temporarily increases damage to large monsters with a successful Sneak Attack. 1 Attack +5% while active. 2 Attack +10% while active. 3 Attack +15% while active. Antivirus 無我の境地 Once infected, makes it easier to overcome the Frenzy and increases affinity if cured. 1 Slightly increases recovery rate after contracting the Frenzy. Affinity +3% if cured. 2 Increases recovery rate after contracting the Frenzy. Affinity +6% if cured. 3 Greatly increases recovery rate after contracting the Frenzy. Affinity +15% if cured. Aquatic/Oilsilt Mobility 水場・油泥適応 Grants resistance against impairments to mobility while in water, oilsilt, or streams. 1 Negates the effects of muddy streams, and prevents you from being slowed down in water or oilsilt. 2 Also negates the effect of waves. Bind Resistance 拘束耐性 Grants protection against webbed status and frostblight. 1 Allows you to quickly recover from webbed status or frostblight. 2 Allows you to very quickly recover from webbed status or frostblight. 3 Prevents webbed status and frostblight. Blast Resistance 爆破やられ耐性 Grants protection against blastblight. 1 Delays blastblight and reduces blast damage. 2 Greatly delays blastblight and greatly reduces blast damage. 3 Prevents blastblight. Bleeding Resistance 裂傷耐性 Grants protection against bleeding. 1 Reduces damage while bleeding. 2 Greatly reduces damage while bleeding. 3 Prevents bleeding. Blight Resistance 属性やられ耐性 Grants protection against all elemental blights. 1 Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 50%. 2 Reduces the duration of all elemental blights by 75%. 3 Nullifies all elemental blights. Blindsider 閃光強化 Improves the effectiveness of flash attacks and items. 1 Improves the effectiveness of flash attacks and items. Bombardier ボマー Increases the damage of explosive items. 1 Explosive power +10% 2 Explosive power +20% 3 Explosive power +30% Botanist 植生学 Increases the quantity of herbs and other consumable items you gather. 1 One extra consumable herb item per gather. 2 Additionally adds one extra consumable fruit, nut, or seed item per gather. 3 Additionally adds one extra consumable insect item per gather. 4 Additionally adds one extra consumable mushroom item per gather. Burst 連撃 Continuously landing hits gradually increases attack and elemental attack. (Amount increased depends on weapon.) 1 On first hit, gain a small temporary attack and element boost, replaced by a larger boost after the fifth hit. 2 Hit 5 times for a moderate stat boost. 3 Hit 5 times for a bigger stat boost. 4 Hit 5 times for an even bigger stat boost. 5 Hit 5 times for a huge stat boost. Cliffhanger クライマー Decreases stamina depletion when climbing on vines. 1 Reduces stamina depletion while climbing by 50%. Coalescence 災禍転福 Temporarily enhances elemental attack power and status effects after recovering from blights or abnormal status. 1 While active, grants a slight increase to elemental damage and status buildup. 2 While active, grants an increase to elemental damage and status buildup. 3 While active, grants a large increase to elemental damage and status buildup. Constitution 体術 Reduces stamina depletion when evading, blocking, or doing other certain actions. 1 Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 10%. 2 Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 20%. 3 Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 30%. 4 Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 40%. 5 Reduces fixed stamina depletion by 50%. Convert Element 属性変換 After taking elemental damage, temporarily grants you dragon element effects. (Cooldown after effect ends) 1 While active, deals extra dragon damage after dealing enough elemental damage. Slightly increases dragon attack. 2 Increases additional dragon damage and increases dragon attack. 3 Further increases additional dragon damage and greatly increases dragon attack. Counterstrike 逆襲 Temporarily increases attack power after being knocked back. 1 Attack +10 while active. 2 Attack +15 while active. Moderately extends effect time. 3 Attack +25 while active. Extends effect time. Defense Boost 防御 Increases defense. Also improves resistances at higher levels. 1 Defense +5 2 Defense +10 3 Defense +5% Bonus: +10 4 Defense +5% Bonus: +20 All Elemental Resistances +3 5 Defense +8% Bonus: +20 All Elemental Resistances +3 6 Defense +8% Bonus: +35 All Elemental Resistances +5 7 Defense +10% Bonus: +35 All Elemental Resistances +5 Divine Blessing 精霊の加護 Has a predetermined chance of reducing the damage you take. 1 While active, reduces damage taken by 15%. 2 While active, reduces damage taken by 30%. 3 While active, reduces damage taken by 50%. Dragon Resistance 龍耐性 Increases dragon resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels. 1 Dragon resistance +6 2 Dragon resistance +12 3 Dragon resistance +20 Defense +10 Earplugs 耳栓 Grants protection from large monsters' roars. 1 Reduces the effects of weak monster roars. 2 Nullifies weak monster roars and reduces the effects of strong monster roars. 3 Nullifies weak and strong monster roars. Elemental Absorption 属性吸収 After taking elemental damage, temporarily grants you element effects. (Cooldown after effect ends) 1 While active, slightly increases elemental attack, and grants +4 resistance to the element that triggered effect. 2 While active, moderately increases elemental attack, and grants +6 resistance to the element that triggered effect. 3 While active, increases elemental attack, and grants +8 resistance to the element that triggered effect. Entomologist 昆虫標本の達人 The bodies of small insect monsters won't be destroyed, allowing them to be carved. 1 Activates skill effect. Evade Extender 回避距離UP Increases evade distance. 1 Slightly extends evasion distance. 2 Extends evasion distance. 3 Greatly extends evasion distance. Evade Window 回避性能 Extends the invulnerability period when evading. 1 Very slightly increases invulnerability window. 2 Slightly increases invulnerability window. 3 Increases invulnerability window. 4 Greatly increases invulnerability window. 5 Massively increases invulnerability window. Fire Resistance 火耐性 Increases fire resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels. 1 Fire resistance +6 2 Fire resistance +12 3 Fire resistance +20 Defense +10 Flayer 鎖刃刺撃 Makes it easier to inflict wounds. Upon inflicting enough damage, also deals additional non-elemental damage. 1 Makes it every so slightly easier to inflict wounds. Also deals additional non-elemental damage. 2 Makes it moderately easier to inflict wounds. Also deals slightly more additional non-elemental damage. 3 Makes it easier to inflict wounds. Also deals moderately more additional non-elemental damage. 4 Makes it much easier to inflict wounds. Also deals more additional non-elemental damage. 5 Makes it significantly easier to inflict wounds. Also deals much more additional non-elemental damage. Flinch Free ひるみ軽減 Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage. 1 Prevents knockbacks. 2 Prevents standard knockbacks. Tripping is reduced to a knockback instead. 3 Prevents knockbacks and tripping. Foray 攻勢 Increases attack power and affinity against large monsters afflicted by poison or paralysis. 1 Attack +6 against poisoned or paralyzed large monsters. 2 Attack +8 and affinity +5% against poisoned or paralyzed large monsters. 3 Attack +10 and affinity +10% against poisoned or paralyzed large monsters. 4 Attack +12 and affinity +15% against poisoned or paralyzed large monsters. 5 Attack +15 and affinity +20% against poisoned or paralyzed large monsters. Free Meal 満足感 Gives you a predetermined chance of consuming a food or drink item for free. 1 Activates 10% of the time. 2 Activates 25% of the time. 3 Activates 45% of the time. Geologist 地質学 Increases the number of times you can use a gathering point. 1 One extra item when gathering from bonepiles. 2 Additionally adds one extra item when gathering special items. 3 Additionally adds one extra item when gathering from mining outcrops. Heroics 火事場力 Increases attack power and defense when health drops to 35% or lower. 1 Defense +50 while active. 2 Attack +5% and defense +50 while active. 3 Attack +5% and defense +100 while active. 4 Attack +10% and defense +100 while active. 5 Attack +30% and defense-increasing effects are negated while active. Hunger Resistance 腹減り耐性 Reduces maximum stamina depletion over time. 1 Extends the time until your stamina cap decreases by 50%. 2 Extends the time until your stamina cap decreases by 100%. 3 Prevents your stamina cap from decreasing. Ice Resistance 氷耐性 Increases ice resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels. 1 Ice resistance +6 2 Ice resistance +12 3 Ice resistance +20 Defense +10 Intimidator 威嚇 Reduces the chances small monsters will attack after spotting you. (Has no effect on certain monsters.) 1 Discourages monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted. 2 Highly discourages monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted. 3 Prevents monsters from engaging you even if you've been spotted. Iron Skin 防御力DOWN耐性 Grants protection against Defense Down. 1 Reduces the duration of Defense Down by 50%. 2 Reduces the duration of Defense Down by 75%. 3 Prevents Defense Down. Item Prolonger アイテム使用強化 Extends the duration of some item effects. 1 Item effect duration +10% 2 Item effect duration +25% 3 Item effect duration +50% Jump Master ジャンプ鉄人 Prevents attacks from knocking you back during a jump. 1 Negates knockback during jumps. Latent Power 力の解放 Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met. (Triggers after taking 180 damage or 300 seconds.) 1 While active, affinity +10% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%. 2 While active, affinity +20% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%. 3 While active, affinity +30% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%. 4 While active, affinity +40% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%. 5 While active, affinity +50% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Leap of Faith 飛び込み Alows you to do a dive-evade when facing towards large monsters, and extends the dive-evade distance. 1 Enables skill use. Marathon Runner ランナー Slows down stamina depletion for actions which continuously drain stamina (such as dashing). 1 Reduces continuous stamina depletion by 15%. 2 Reduces continuous stamina depletion by 30%. 3 Reduces continuous stamina depletion by 50%. Maximum Might 渾身 Increases affinity as long as stamina is kept full for a period of time. 1 Affinity +10% while active 2 Affinity +20% while active 3 Affinity +30% while active Mushroomancer キノコ大好き Lets you digest mushrooms that would otherwise be inedible and gain their advantageous effects. 1 Lets you digest blue mushrooms and toadstools. (Blue Mushroom = Potion, Toadstools = Immunizer) 2 Additionally lets you digest nitroshrooms and parashrooms. (Nitroshroom = Demondrug, Parashroom = Armorskin) 3 Additionally lets you digest mandragoras, devil's blight, and exciteshrooms. (Mandragora = Max Potion, Devil's Blight = Dash Juice, Exciteshroom = random effect) Outdoorsman ハンター生活 Improves fishing, grilling, and transporting abilities. 1 Improves fishing, grilling, and transporting abilities. Palico Rally オトモへの采配 Powers up Palicoes. 1 Increases Palico attack power and defense by 5%. 2 Increases Palico attack power and defense by 10%. 3 Increases Palico attack power and defense by 15%. 4 Increases Palico attack power and defense by 20%. 5 Increases Palico attack power and defense by 25%. Paralysis Resistance 麻痺耐性 Reduces the duration of paralysis. 1 Reduces the duration of paralysis by 30%. 2 Reduces the duration of paralysis by 60%. 3 Prevents paralysis. Partbreaker 破壊王 Makes it easier to break large monster parts, and increases damage dealt when destroying a wound with a Focus Strike. 1 Part damage and damage when conditions are fulfilled increased by 10%. 2 Part damage and damage when conditions are fulfilled increased by 20%. 3 Part damage and damage when conditions are fulfilled increased by 30%. Peak Performance フルチャージ Increases attack when your health is full. 1 Attack +3 while active. 2 Attack +6 while active. 3 Attack +10 while active. 4 Attack +15 while active. 5 Attack +20 while active. Poison Resistance 毒耐性 Reduces damage while poisoned. 1 Reduces the number of times you take poison damage 2 Greatly reduces the number of times you take poison damage. 3 Prevents poison. Quick Sheath 納刀術 Speeds up weapon sheating. 1 Slightly increases sheathing speed. 2 Moderately increases sheathing speed. 3 Greatly increases sheathing speed. Recovery Speed 回復速度 Speeds healing of recoverable damage (the red portion of the Health Gauge). 1 Doubles the speed at which you heal recoverable damage. 2 Triples the speed at which you heal recoverable damage. 3 Quadruples the speed at which you heal recoverable damage. Recovery Up 体力回復量UP Increases the amount recovered when restoring health. 1 Slightly increases recovery. 2 Increases recovery. 3 Greatly increases recovery. Resentment 逆恨み Increases attack when you have recoverable damage (the red portion of your health gauge). 1 Attack +5 while active. 2 Attack +10 while active. 3 Attack +15 while active. 4 Attack +20 while active. 5 Attack +25 while active. Rice Ball にぎりめし Increases the attack power of Akuma actions and stun damage. 1 Activates skill effect. Self-Improvement 研鑽 Attack and defense increase as time passes while on a quest. (The maximum is reached after 30 minutes.) 1 Activates skill effect. Shock Absorber 緩衝 Disables damage reactions when you hit a friend or a friend hits you. 1 Activates skill effect. Sleep Resistance 睡眠耐性 Reduces the duration of sleep. 1 Reduces the duration of sleep by 30%. 2 Reduces the duration of sleep by 60%. 3 Prevents sleep. Speed Eating 早食い Increases meat-eating and item-consumption speed. 1 Moderately increases eating speed. 2 Increases eating speed. 3 Greatly increases eating speed. Stamina Surge スタミナ急速回復 Speeds up stamina recovery. 1 Stamina recovery speed +10% 2 Stamina recovery speed +20% 3 Stamina recovery speed +30% Stench Resistance 悪臭耐性 Grants protection against stench. 1 Reduces stench duration by 50%. 2 Prevents stench. Stun Resistance 気絶耐性 Reduces the duration of stun. 1 Reduces the duration of stun by 60%. 2 Reduces the duration of stun by 90%. 3 Prevents stun. Survival Expert 環境利用の知識 Extra health is recovered from environmental interactables. 1 Restores 50 health. 2 Restores 80 health. 3 Restores 100 health. Thunder Resistance 雷耐性 Increases thunder resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels. 1 Thunder resistance +6 2 Thunder resistance +12 3 Thunder resistance +20 Defense +10 Tool Specialist 整備 Reduces the recharge time for specialized tools. 1 Shortens recharge time by 10%. 2 Shortens recharge time by 20%. 3 Shortens recharge time by 30%. 4 Shortens recharge time by 40%. 5 Shortens recharge time by 50%. Tremor Resistance 耐震 Grants protection against ground tremors. 1 Nullifies very minor ground tremors and reduces the effects of minor ground tremors. 2 Nullifies up to minor ground tremors and reduces the effects of major ground tremors. 3 Nullifies all ground tremors. Water Resistance 水耐性 Increases water resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels. 1 Water resistance +6 2 Water resistance +12 3 Water resistance +20 Defense +10 Weakness Exploit 弱点特効 Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot. 1 Attacks that hit weak spots gain 5% affinity, with an extra 3% on wounds. 2 Attacks that hit weak spots gain 10% affinity, with an extra 5% on wounds. 3 Attacks that hit weak spots gain 15% affinity, with an extra 10% on wounds. 4 Attacks that hit weak spots gain 20% affinity, with an extra 15% on wounds. 5 Attacks that hit weak spots gain 25% affinity, with an extra 20% on wounds. Wide-Range 広域化 Allows the effects of certain items to also affect nearby allies. 1 Items affect nearby allies with 33% of their efficacy. 2 Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius with 33% of their efficacy. 3 Items affect nearby allies in a wider radius at 66% of their efficacy. 4 Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with 66% of their efficacy. 5 Items affect nearby allies in a much wider radius with full efficacy. Windproof 風圧耐性 Grants protection against wind pressure. 1 Negates minor wind pressure and reduces the effects of major wind pressure. 2 Negates minor and major wind pressure and reduces the effects of dragon wind pressure. 3 Negates all kinds of wind pressure. Scaling Prowess 鱗張りの技法 Master Mounter 乗り名人 3 Makes it easier to mount monsters and to wound them once mounted. Nu Udra's Mutiny 獄焔蛸の反逆 Bad Blood I 恨撃Ⅰ 2 Deals moderate additional damage while the Resentment skill is active. Bad Blood II 恨撃Ⅱ 4 Deals additional damage while the Resentment skill is active. Rathalos's Flare 火竜の力 Scorcher I 灼熱化Ⅰ 2 Chance to deal additional fire damage after landing an attack. Scorcher II 灼熱化Ⅱ 4 Increases additional fire damage after landing an attack. (Lasts 150s) Thunderous Roar II 雷々響鳴Ⅱ 4 Extends the activation time of the Latent Power skill. (Lasts 210s) Seregios's Tenacity 千刃竜の闘志 Razor's Edge I 千刃の身躱しⅠ 2 Extends the duration of Adrenaline Rush. If triggered again while the skill is active, extends the effect's duration once. (Lasts 45s, retriggering adds an additional 15s) Razor's Edge II 千刃の身躱しⅡ 4 Additionally, if triggered again while the skill is active, further increases attack. (Attack +5%) Soul of the Dark Knight 暗黒騎士の証 Dark Arts ダークアーツ 2 Having recoverable damage increases elemental attack, and some great sword Lvl 3 charged slashes are strengthened. The Blackest Night ブラックナイト 4 Allows you to perform the special action: The Blackest Night. (Use special action item to consume health and gain a temporary shield. Effect lasts 30s. Reuse attack or wait until effect expires to perform a strong slash.) Uth Duna's Cover 波衣竜の守護 Protective Veil I 守護のヴェールⅠ 2 Increases defense temporarily when using a specialized tool. (Defense +25 for 180s) Protective Veil II 守護のヴェールⅡ 4 Greatly increases defense and resistance temporarily when using a specialized tool. (Defense +50 and all res +12 for 180s) Xu Wu's Vigor 暗器蛸の力 Protein Fiend I 蛮勇の食卓Ⅰ 2 Temporarily grants +15 attack after eating items like Well-Done Steak.
