# MHWilds: Item List

MHWilds: Weapons ・ MHWilds: Armors ・ MHWilds: Monsters ・ MHWilds: Monster Material List ・ MHWilds: Palico Gear ・ MHWilds: Locations ・ MHWilds: Skills ・ MHWilds: Item List ・ MHWilds: Assigned Quests ・ MHWilds: Optional Quests ・ MHWilds: Event Quests ・ MHWilds: Endemic Life List ・ MHWilds: Decorations ・ MHWilds: Charm List Note : For a list of Monster Materials, see the MHWilds: Monster Material List page. Contents 1 Healing/Support 2 Essentials/Supply 3 Fishing Bait 4 Traps/Offense 5 Ammo/Coatings 6 Ingredients/Special Items 7 Misc 8 Misc 9 Trade-in Materials Healing/Support [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Potion 回復薬 1 x 10 8z Combine Herb Buy from Provisions Restores a small amount of health. Mega Potion 回復薬グレート 2 x 10 16z Combine Potion and Honey Restores a moderate amount of health. Max Potion 3 x 2 210z Combine Catalyst and Mandragora Fully restores health and temporarily maximizes the size of your Health Gauge. Ancient Potion 4 x 1 345z Combine Immunizer and Nourishing Extract. Fully restores health and temporarily maximizes the size of your Health and Stamina Gauges. Life Powder 4 x 3 190z Combine Godbug Essence and Blue Mushroom. Produces a cloud that heals you and anyone nearby. Buy from Provisions. Dust of Life 6 x 2 690z Combine Godbug Essence and Gloamgross Bud. Produces a cloud that restores a large amount of health for you and anyone nearby. Ration 1 x 10 3z Ingredients Center at any Support Desk Felynes. Food that restores a bit of stamina. It can also be used on the Portable BBQ Grill to have a meal. Well-done Steak 2 x 5 48z Grilling Raw Meat at the Portable BBQ Grill and timing it right to not undercook or overcook. A hearty roast that restores health and stamina and boosts both their max gauges. So tasty! Rare Steak 1 x 10 3z Grilling Raw Meat at the Portable BBQ Grill and undercooking it. Restores health and stamina and moderately increases the size of your Health Gauge temporarily. Burnt Steak 1 x 10 1z Grilling Raw Meat at the Portable BBQ Grill and overcooking it. Restores stamina, but it may be a bit too charred to provide any healing effects... Nullberry 2 x 10 120z Gathering in Windward Plains , Scarlet Forest , Oilwell Basin , Iceshard Cliffs and Ruins of Wyveria . A mysterious berry that cures various blights. Antidote 1 x 10 6z Combine Antidote Herb. Buy from Provisions. A cure for poison. Herbal Medicine 2 x 5 25z Combine Antidote and Blue Mushroom. Removes all traces of poison and restores a slight amount of health. Herbal Powder 4 x 3 315z Combine Godbug Essence and and Herbal Medicine Produces a cloud that cures poison and heals you a bit. Energy Drink 2 x 10 6z Combine Nitroshroom and Honey. A Guild-approved beverage that boosts your stamina. Helps shake off sleep, too! Cleanser 2 x 10 14z Combine Fire Herb and Godbug Essence. Immediately removes any frost or webbing on your body. Deodorant 2 x 10 8z Combine Smokenut and Bitterbug Broth. Produces a cloud of cleansing smoke that cures blastblight and stench. Wild Jerky 2 x 5 10z Buy from Provisions. Dried meat beloved for its wild flavor and toughness. Increases natural healing and cures bleeding. Charred Lizard 4 x 10 80z TBA A lizard charred crispy by Wudwuds. Removes all traces of poison and restores both health and stamina. Cool Drink 1 x 5 30z Combine Chillshroom. Buy from Provisions. Provides temporary relief from extreme heat. Hot Drink 1 x 5 25z Combine Hot Pepper. Buy from Provisions. Provides temporary relief from extreme Cold. Immunizer 3 x 10 92z Combine Bitterbug Broth and Mandragora. Temporarily boosts your natural ability to recover lost health. Dash Juice 3 x 10 92z Combine Catalyst and Dash Extract. Temporarily boosts your natural ability to recover lost health. Might Seed 2 x 10 140z Gathering in Oilwell Basin and Ruins of Wyveria . Temporarily strengthens your attacks when ingested by improving energy flow. Demondrug 4 x 5 67z Combine Catalyst and Might Seed. Temporarily boosts your attack power by filling you with demonic strength. Mega Demondrug 5 x 5 283z Combine Nourishing Extract and Demondrug. Temporarily boosts your attack power even more than a regular Demondrug. Might Pill 4 x 5 280z Combine Immunizer and Might Seed. Temporarily endows you with the strength of a mighty god. Potent! Demon Powder 4 x 3 315z Combine Godbug Essence and Might Seed. A mysterious powder that produces a cloud around the area that temporarily strengthens attacks. Adamant Seed 2 x 10 110z Gather in Windward Plains , Scarlet Forest , Iceshard Cliffs and Ruins of Wyveria . Temporarily raises your defense when ingested by hardening tissue. Armorskin 4 x 5 58z Combine Catalyst and Adamant Seed. Temporarily boosts your defense by turning your skin as hard as rock. Mega Armorskin 5 x 5 269z Combine Nourishing Extract and Armorskin. Temporarily boosts your defense even more than regular Armorskin. Adamant Pill 4 x 5 260z Combine Immunizer and Adamant Seed. Temporarily makes your skin as hard as adamant. Potent! Hardshell Powder 4 x 3 315z Combine Godbug Essence and Adamant Seed. A mysterious powder; when dispersed, temporarily strengthens defense. Farcaster 3 x 1 30z Combine Smokenut and Exciteshroom. Call for a wingdrake to transport you to the nearest camp. Can also be used during combat. Raw Meat 1 x 10 5z Slay and carve Ceratonoth (30%), Dalthydon (100%), Gelidron (100%) and Rafma (100%). Quest rewards from some Quests. Meat carved from a monster. Can be cooked, combined, or used to set a trap. Drugged Meat 2 x 10 32z Combine Raw Meat and Sleep Herb. Raw meat that puts whatever eats it to sleep. Makes great bait for traps. Poisoned Meat 2 x 10 19z Combine Raw Meat and Toadstool. Raw meat that poisons whatever eats it. Makes great bait for traps. Tinged Meat 2 x 10 30z Combine Raw Meat and Parashroom. Raw meat that paralyzes whatever eats it. Makes great bait for traps. Whetfish Fin 2 x 10 45z Fishing the smaller Whetfish in Windward Plains , Scarlet Forest or Oilwell Basin by using the Fishing Rod or the Capture Net. A fish fin that greatly restores sharpness and requires fewer strokes than a whetstone. Whetfish Fin+ 4 x 5 45z Fishing the bigger Whetfish in Windward Plains , Scarlet Forest or Oilwell Basin by using the Fishing Rod or the Capture Net. A fish fin used to sharpen weapons. Works better than a whetstone and can be reused if you"re lucky. Sushifish Scale 2 x 10 45z Fishing the smaller Sushifish in Windward Plains or Scarlet Forest by using the Fishing Rod or the Capture Net. A scale from a Sushifish. Slightly restores health and treats bleeding. Great Sushifish Scale 4 x 5 45z Fishing the bigger Sushifish in Windward Plains or Scarlet Forest by using the Fishing Rod or the Capture Net. Scale from a Sushifish. Eat to get a large health/natural healing boost or to treat bleeding. Essentials/Supply [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Binoculars 4 x z Always in the inventory. A tool that magnifies distant objects and lets you learn more about them. (You can use it to see if a Monster is either Small Crown, Silver Crown or Gold Crown) Camping Kit 4 x z Always in the inventory. A kit with all the tools to make camp. Use to set up and edit Pop-up Camps in available campsites. Capture Net 4 x z Always in the inventory. A net that can be fired from your Slinger. Use it to capture small creatures. Fishing Rod 4 x z Always in the inventory. A tool for fishing. Cast the lure into bodies of water and use the reel to wind in the line. Paint Pod 4 x z Always in the inventory. Slinger ammo that makes a monster or location temporarily easier to find. Portable BBQ Grill 4 x z Always in the inventory. A portable BBQ grill that can be used for grilling up raw meat and other ingredients. Throwing Knife 4 x z Always in the inventory. A knife that can be equipped to your Slinger. Can be coated with a range of substances. Whetstone 4 x z Always in the inventory. A standard-sized whetstone. Use it to restore a weapon's sharpness. Ghillie Mantle 4 x z Unlocked by default at the start of the game. Temporarily conceal yourself from view. The effect ends if you perform an attack or take damage. Rocksteady Mantle 4 x z Defeat Nu Udra to complete Black Flame Low Rank main mission, then head to Windward Plains Base Camp and speak to Gemma . Negates damage reactions, protects hearing, grants wind and tremor resistance, and reduces damage. Mending Mantle 4 x z Defeat Xu Wu to complete Full Circle Mission Low Rank main mission, then head to Base Camp and speak to Gemma . Steadily restores health over a set amount of time. Evasion Mantle 4 x z Defeat Frenzied Nerscylla to complete Wyvern Sparks and Rose Thorns High Rank mission, then head to Base Camp and speak to Gemma . Upon just evading a blow, triggers a special evasive maneuver that boosts attack and alters combos. Corrupted Mantle 4 x z Defeat Gore Magala to complete A World Turned Upside Down High Rank mission, then head to Base Camp and speak to Gemma . Decreases health, but raises affinity and weapon stats. Attack and affinity further increased in certain conditions. First-aid Med 4 x 10 z Always in the inventory. Restores a small amount of health. Returned after quest completion. First-aid Med+ 4 x 10 z Always in the inventory. Restores a moderate amount of health. Returned after quest completion. EZ Max Potion 4 x 2 z Always in the inventory. Fully restores health and maximizes the size of your Health Gauge. Returned after quest completion. EZ Life Powder 4 x 3 z Always in the inventory. Produces a cloud that heals you and anyone nearby. Returned after quest completion. EZ Dust of Life 4 x 2 z Always in the inventory. Releases a cloud that restores a large amount of health. Returned after quest completion. EZ Ration 4 x 10 z Always in the inventory. Restores a small amount of stamina. Not usable with Portable BBQ Grill. Returned after quest completion. EZ Herbal Powder 4 x 3 z Always in the inventory. Cures poison and restores a bit of health for everyone nearby. Returned after quest completion. EZ Demon Powder 4 x 3 z Always in the inventory. Temporarily strengthens attacks for everyone nearby. Returned after quest completion. EZ Hardshell Powder 4 x 3 z Always in the inventory. Temporarily increases defense for everyone nearby. Returned after quest completion. EZ Tranq Bomb 4 x 8 z Always in the inventory. A hand grenade used to capture monsters ensnared in traps. Returned after quest completion. EZ Farcaster 4 x 1 z Always in the inventory. Call for a wingdrake to transport you to the nearest camp. Returned after quest completion. EZ Large Barrel Bomb 4 x 2 z Always in the inventory. An improved large barrel bomb. Can be rolled after being placed. Returned after quest completion. EZ Pitfall Trap 4 x 1 z Always in the inventory. Activates a pitfall to catch monsters with. Returned after quest completion. EZ Shock Trap 4 x 1 z Always in the inventory. A trap that immobilizes a target. Use it to capture monsters. Returned after quest completion. EZ Flash Pod 4 x 3 z Always in the inventory. Slinger ammo that explodes with a bright flash after it's fired. Returned after quest completion. EZ Sonic Bomb 4 x 3 z Always in the inventory. Slinger ammo that emits an earsplitting sonic blast. Returned after quest completion. EZ Dung Pode 4 x 10 z Always in the inventory. Releases a strong odor on impact. Returned after quest completion. EZ Large Dung Pod 4 x 10 z Always in the inventory. Releases a foul odor over a wide area on impact. Returned after quest completion. Fishing Bait [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Common Wood Minnow 4 x z Unlocked by Default. A common wooden lure shaped like a small fish. Good for any kind of fish. Duster Rig 4 x z Obtained after starting the Side Mission, The Catch of a Lifetime! . A lure shaped like a Starduster. Good for catching fish that like dark or muddy places, like Gajau. Emerald Jitterbait 4 x z Obtained after starting the Side Mission, Seeking the Goldenfish . A lure with a blade made of ore. Good for catching useful fish, like Sushifish. Golden Bughead 4 x z Obtained after starting the Side Mission, Seeking the Goldenfish . A lure that looks like a shining beetle. Good for catching gaudy fish, like Goldenfish. Tentacle Jig 4 x z Obtained after starting the Side Mission, Razzle Dazzle . A lure made with thorngrass. Good for catching aquatic creatures that have tentacles or feelers. Tuff Joint Bait 4 x z Obtained after starting the Side Mission, The Catch of a Lifetime! . A lure shaped like a Cephalos. Good for catching large, swift fish, like Gastronome Tuna. Powercharm 5 x 1 0z Rewards from the quest Secure Wounded Hollow . An amulet that strengthens attacks. Just carrying this gives you demonic strength. Armorcharm 5 x 1 0z Rewards from the quest As Gatekeeper after completing Secure Wounded Hollow. An amulet that increases defense. Just carrying this makes your skin stone hard. Traps/Offense [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Small Barrel 1 x 10 8z Buy from Provisions. A small, empty barrel. Combine with fire herbs to make it into a bomb. Small Barrel Bomb 2 x 10 16z Combine Fireherb and Small Barrel. A small time bomb. Large Barrel 2 x 5 21z Buy from Provisions. A large, empty barrel. Combine with gunpowder to make it into a bomb. Large Barrel Bomb 3 x 2 52z Combine Large Barrel and Gunpowder. A bomb that can be rolled after placing it on the ground. Strike it to trigger a powerful blast. Mega Barrel Bomb 4 x 2 80z Combine Devil's Blight and Large Barrel Bomb. Combine Gunpowderfish Scale and [File:MHWilds-Bomb_Icon_Vermilion.png An upgraded large barrel bomb. Effective against large monsters. Can be rolled after placement. Blossom Barrel Bomb 4 x 2 52z Login Bonus during the Blossomdance Festival. A large barrel bomb from the Blossomdance. Explodes with a flurry of flower petals. Smoke Bomb 2 x 3 44z Combine Smokenut and Ivy. Creates a large cloud of smoke when thrown against the ground that can hide you from a monster"s sight. Poison Smoke Bomb 2 x 5 60z Combine Smokenut and Toadstool. Releases a cloud of toxic mist when used. Also popular as a household bug bomb. Tranq Bomb 3 x 8 35z Combine Sleep Herb and Parashroom . A hand grenade used to capture monsters ensnared in traps. Can be slammed against the ground. Shock Trap 3 x 1 160z Combine Thunderbug Capacitor and Trap Tool. Can sometimes be bought from the Support Ship. A trap that immobilizes a target. Use it to capture monsters. Pitfall Trap 3 x 1 200z Combine Net and Trap Tool. Can sometimes be bought from the Support Ship. A fish fin that greatly restores sharpness and requires fewer strokes than a whetstone. Stone 1 x 20 z Gather from the ground on some maps. Slinger ammo that can be used to hit faraway plant life and bombs. Flash Pod 2 x 3 57z Combine Flashbug Phosphor. Can sometimes be bought from the Support Ship. Slinger ammo that causes a violent flash on impact. Will temporarily blind monsters if used in front of them. Thorngrass Pod 1 x 3 z Gather from the ground on some maps. Slinger ammo that lodges into a target. Attacking where it's lodged deals extra damage. Screamer Pod 2 x 3 45z Use the Slinger when close to a Baunos . Can sometimes be bought from the Support Ship. Slinger ammo that emits a harsh, high-frequency sound that can disrupt sensitive monsters. Bleeding Pod 2 x 3 z Use the Slinger when close to a Gajios . Slinger ammo that can be used to inflict massive damage on monster wounds. Dung Pod 2 x 10 20z Combine Dung. Combine Rolled-up Dung. Slinger ammo that releases a strong odor on impact. Causes certain monsters to flee. Large Dung Pod 3 x 10 40z Combine Dung Pod and Nitroshroom. Slinger ammo that releases a strong odor on impact, causing any surrounding monsters to flee. Grounding Pod 1 x 5 z Pick up Grounding Stones in the Windward Plains Area 17. Slinger ammo that can dissipate electricity from the area it lands. Poison Pod 2 x 2 z Pick up a Crystalized Venom in the Iceshard Cliffs Area 5. Slinger ammo that inflicts poison on a target upon impact. Para Pod 2 x 2 z Use the Slinger when close to a Rafma . Slinger ammo that inflicts paralysis on a target upon impact. Brightmoss 1 x 5 z Pick up from Brightmoss commonly found in the Scarlet Forest . Slinger ammo that illuminates dark areas when fired and can dazzle flying monsters. Torch Pod 1 x 5 z Pick up from Sparkflint commonly found in the Oilwell Basin . Slinger ammo that can be used to scare away creatures that don't like fire and draw in those that do. Puddle Pod 1 x 5 z Pick up from Watermoss commonly found in the Scarlet Forest . Slinger ammo imbued with water element. Can remove some statuses on monsters. Bomb Pod 1 x 3 z Pick up from Bomb Beetles commonly found in the Oilwell Basin . Slinger ammo that explodes on impact. Piercing Pod 1 x 3 z Use the Slinger when close to a Harpios . Slinger ammo that deals piercing damage on impact. Thunder Pod 1 x 5 z Pick up from Thundercryst in the Ruins of Wyveria . Slinger ammo imbued with thunder element. Frost Pod 1 x 5 z Pick up from Frostlanterns in the Ruins of Wyveria . Slinger ammo imbued with thunder element. Dragon Pod 1 x 5 z Pick up from Wyrmsbane in the Ruins of Wyveria . Slinger ammo imbued with thunder element. Frostburst 1 x 5 z Pick up from Rime Beetle in the Iceshard Cliffs . Slinger ammo imbued with the ice element. Use it to stagger a monster when you're in a pinch. Heavy Blunt Pod 2 x 2 z Break certain monsters parts. Slinger ammo that inflicts massive blunt damage where it lands. Heavy Slicing Pod 2 x 2 z Break certain monsters parts. Slinger ammo that inflicts massive severing damage where it lands. Heavy Piercing Pod 2 x 2 z Break certain monsters parts. Slinger ammo that inflicts massive piercing damage where it lands. Heavy Explosion Pod 2 x 2 z Break certain Tempered monsters parts, like Quematrice and Rathian. Slinger ammo that explodes on impact, causing massive damage. Luring Pod 3 x 3 50z Combine Exciteshroom and Bitterbug Broth. Slinger ammo that can be used to lure monsters toward yourself. Tranq Blade 3 x 8 4z Combine Tranq Bomb and Throwing Knife. A knife coated with a tranquilizer that can be shot from your Slinger to put trapped monsters to sleep. Ammo/Coatings [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Normal Ammo 1 x Unlimited z Always available as long as your ranged weapon can shoot this ammo type. Standard ammo. Fires multiple shots with each pull of the trigger. Unlimited capacity. Spread Ammo 1 x Unlimited z Always available as long as your ranged weapon can shoot this ammo type. Ammo made for close combat. Short range but high power. Unlimited capacity. Piercing Ammo 1 x Unlimited z Always available as long as your ranged weapon can shoot this ammo type. Armor-piercing ammo. Depending on the monster, it can deal multiple hits. Unlimited capacity. Slicing Ammo 2 x 12 3z Buy from provisions Combine Slashberry Combine Normal Ammo and Burst Arowana Scale. Ammo that ejects sharp blades on impact, which can sever tails. Sticky Ammo 1 x 9 2z Buy from provisions Combine Blastnut Combine Normal Ammo and Bomb Arowana Scale. Powerful ammo that lodges in a target and explodes. Headshots stun. Cluster Bomb 2 x 3 6z Buy from provisions Combine Bomberry. Ammo that fragments into multiple shells upon impact. Beware of friendly fire! Wyvern Ammo 3 x 5 6z Buy from provisions Combine Dragonstrike Nut. Ammo created through years of research into Wyvern's Fire. Short ranged, but destructive. Paralysis Ammo 2 x 12 3z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Parashroom. Ammo that causes paralysis. Some targets require multiple shots in order for the status to take effect. Poison Ammo 2 x 12 2z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Toadstool. Ammo that inflicts poison. Some targets require multiple shots in order for the status to take effect. Sleep Ammo 2 x 12 2z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Sleep Herb. Ammo that induces sleep. Some targets require multiple shots in order for the status to take effect. Flaming Ammo 2 x 60 2z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Fireherb. Ammo that packs a punch against monsters susceptible to fire. Water Ammo 2 x 60 2z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Flowerfern. Ammo that packs a punch against monsters susceptible to water. Thunder Ammo 2 x 60 2z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Thunderbug Capacitor. Ammo that packs a punch against monsters susceptible to thunder. Freeze Ammo 2 x 60 2z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and 16px Snow Herb. Ammo that packs a punch against monsters susceptible to ice. Dragon Ammo 3 x 4 10z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Dragonfell Berry. Ammo that packs a punch against monsters weak to dragon. Recover Ammo 2 x 3 2z Buy from provisions >Combine Normal Ammo and Blue Mushroom. Ammo that produces a healing cloud in the impact zone of where it lands. Demon Ammo 4 x 3 9z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Might Seed. Ammo that produces a cloud that temporarily strengthens attacks in the impact zone of where it lands. Armor Ammo 4 x 3 7z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Adamant Seed. Ammo that produces a cloud that temporarily strengthens defense in the impact zone of where it lands. Exhaust Ammo 2 x 12 3z Buy from provisions Combine Normal Ammo and Exciteshroom. Ammo that drains a monster's stamina. Tranq Ammo 3 x 8 4z Combine Normal Ammo and Tranq Bomb. Ammo used to capture monsters ensnared in traps. Close-range Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating designed to deal more damage to nearby targets, at the cost of a reduced maximum range. Power Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating that increases the attack power of arrows. Piercing Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating that increases piercing ability. Depending on the monster, it can deal multiple hits. Paralysis Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating that applies paralysis effects to arrows. Poison Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating that applies poison effects to arrows. Sleep Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating that applies sleep effects to arrows. Blast Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating that applies explosive powder to arrows. Exhaust Coating 4 x z Fill and use Trick Arrow Gauge with a Bow that can use this coating. A coating that applies a fluid which induces exhaust to arrows. Ingredients/Special Items [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Kunafa Cheese 5 x 99 200z Quest Reward from Eye of the Storm optional quest. Trade Windward Aloe or Fine Windward Aloe with Kilama at Kunafa Village when available. An artisan cheese made in Kunafa, deliciously gooey when heated, and a great addition to any dish. Sharp Kunafa Cheese 5 x 99 300z Quest Rewards from Beware the Gypceros , A Leviathan's Temper and Continuing Conflict optional quests. Trade Thundering Fulgurite or Great Windward Aloe with Kilama at Kunafa Village when available. A rich, decadent cheese made by skilled craftspeople. A great addition to any dish. Droolshroom 4 x 99 200z Trade Shiny Treasure or Sparkly Treasure with Musharpeye at the Wudwud Hideout when available. A mushroom that grows in a secret spot known only to Wudwuds. A great addition to any dish. Delishroom 5 x 99 300z Quest Rewards from Make Fluffy Dealings and Fur Damagings Are Dislikeworthy optional quests. Trade Eternal Scarlet Amber or Bulky Treasure with Musharpeye at the Wudwud Hideout when available. An extremely rare delicacy that is cause for a Wudwud celebration. A great addition to any dish. Mud Shrimp 4 x 99 200z Quest Rewards from Toward Fervent Fields and Succulent Scraps optional quests. Trade Drifting Sea Pot or Royal Sea Pot with Aida, Antimite or Fine Antimite with Dogard, or Auric Oil with Yabran at Azuz, Eternal Forge when available TESTEE. Turbid Shrimp 5 x 99 300z Quest Rewards from Aida's Apprehensions and Troublemakers . Trade Antimite Mass with Dogard or Time-honed Wylk Gem with Yabran at Azuz, Eternal Forge when available. A nutritious shrimp native to Oilwell Basin and favored in Azuz. A great addition to any dish. Fluffy Egg 4 x 99 200z Quest Reward from Broken Chains optional quest. Trade 3x Wyvernscale Vase or Dragonvase Scale with Sekka at Suja when available. An egg with a yolk and white as fluffy as the Downy Crake that laid it. A great addition to any dish. Airy Egg 5 x 99 300z Quest Rewards from Echoing from the Cliffs optional quest. Trade Wyvernsprout or Large Goldenscale Vase with Sekka at Suja when available. A high-quality egg that sends you straight to flavor heaven. A great addition to any dish. Sild Garlic 4 x 99 200z Trade 3x Wyveria Lantern or 1x Mature Wyveria Lantern with Ren in Sild when available. A highly nutritious and fragrant bulb of garlic grown in Sild. A great addition to any dish. Specialty Sild Garlic 5 x 99 300z Quest Reward from Astonishing Adaptability and The Struggle to Survive optional quests. Trade Genesis Opal with Ren in Sild when available. The ultimate bulb of garlic, grown in just the right conditions. A great addition to any dish. Wild Herb 4 x 99 100z Quest Rewards from New Ecossystems and Samin's Special Research Report optional quests. Trade 10x Ancient Wyverian Coins with Gawdygog or Queensbloom Pollen with Mursharpeye at Wudwud Hideout when available. This herb's refreshing aroma can mask any foul odor. A great finishing touch to any dish. Eastern Honey 4 x 99 100z Quest Reward from A Leviatan's Temper optional quest. Can sometimes be gatered from Sparkling Honey Spots during Plenty Season Trade 10x Ancient Wyverian Coins with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Fossilized Fire Opal with Ren at Sild when available. Has a unique flavor, making it the perfect secret ingredient. A great finishing touch to any dish. Monster Chili 4 x 99 100z Quest Reward from As Gatekeeper optional quest. Can sometimes be gathered from Sparkling Sandpepper Nodes during Plenty Season. Trade 10x Ancient Wyverian Coins with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout, Fiery Sandpepper with Kilama at Kunafa or Royal Sea Pot with Aida at Azuz, Eternal Forge when available. A powerful spice that enhances flavor and sweat production. A great finishing touch to any dish. Jeweled Mullet Roe 4 x 99 100z Quest Reward from Fishing for Flavor and Razzle Dazzle optional quest Obtained by fishing Gravid Bowfin during Plenty Season. Trade 10x Ancient Wyverian Coins with Gawdygog or Queensbloom Pollen with Mursharpeye at Wudwud Hideout when available. These fish eggs truly shine like diamonds. A great finishing touch to any dish. Wild Seed Oil 4 x 99 100z Quest Rewad from Secure Wounded Hollow quest. Can sometimes be gathered from Sparkling Seed Nodes during Plenty Season. Trade 10x Ancient Wyverian Coins with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Wylk Gem with Yabran at Azuz, Eternal Forge when available. Oil that packs both flavor and the power of nature. A great finishing touch to any dish. Truffle Du Conga 4 x 99 100z Quest Reward from Make Fluffy Dealings optional quest. Can sometimes be gathered from Unearthed Truffle Fragments that Congalala dig up when hunting it. Trade Chaliceweed with Rover when available. Often dug up by its namesake, Congalala. A great finishing touch to any dish. Windward Aloe 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Windward Succulents at the Windward Plains areas 8, 10, 13 and 16, especially during Plenty Season. Obtained from Murtabak Material Retrieval . Found in the Windward Plains. The water stored within its plump leaves has saved many a parched traveler. Fine Windward Aloe 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Windward Succulents at the Windward Plains areas 8, 10, 13 and 16, especially during Plenty Season. Obtained from Murtabak Material Retrieval . A rarity from the Windward Plains. A single drop of its delicious sap transforms water into ambrosia. Great Windward Aloe 6 x 99 500z Gathered from Great Windward Succulents at the Windward Plains areas 8, 10, 14 and 16, only durin Great Windward Aloe Emergence . A treasure of the Windward Plains. Its leaves hold enough water to fill a bath in the driest desert. Sandpepper 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Sandpepper Nodes at the Windward Plains areas 7, 8 and 9, especially during Plenty Season. Found in the Windward Plains. This dried spice lends a rich and aromatic heat to any dish. Fiery Sandpepper 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Sandpepper Nodes at the Windward Plains areas 7, 8 and 9, especially during Plenty Season. A rarity from the Windward Plains. A spice so hot that a single bite opens the taster's third eye. Fulgurite Shard 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Fulgurite Crystal Nodes at the Windward Plains areas 1, 2, 3, 5, and 7. Found in the Windward Plains. The shape of this fulgurite was sculpted by a chance lightning strike. Pure Fulgurite 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Fulgurite Crystal Nodes at the Windward Plains areas 1, 2, 3, 5, and 7. A rarity from the Windward Plains. Crystallized fulgurite, free of any impurity. Extremely delicate. Thundering Fulgurite 6 x 99 500z Gathered from Fulgurite Veins at the Windward Plains areas 1, 3, 4 and 5, only during Thundering Fulgurite Emergence . A treasure of the Windward Plains. A colossal fulgurite crystal, born of a sky-splitting thunderstrike. Scarlet Amber Shard 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Amber Deposits at the Scarlet Forest areas 1, 2, 3, 9, 10, 12 and 13. Amber from the Scarlet Forest. The bodies of fossilized insects float in its scarlet confines. Fine Amber Shard 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Amber Deposits at the Scarlet Forest areas 1, 2, 3, 9, 10, 12 and 13. Rare amber from the Scarlet Forest. Immaculate insect specimens sleep in this amber, red as fine liquor. Scarlet Amber Shard 6 x 99 500z Gathered from Colossal Ambers at the Scarlet Forest areas 2, 3, 7 or 12, only during Colossal Amber Emergence . Colossal amber from the Scarlet Forest. Ancient life has been sealed away inside it for eons. Shiny Treasure 4 x 99 100z Gathered From Weathered Treasure Nodes at the Scarlet Forest areas 1, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16 and 17. Obtained from Plumpeach Material Retrieval . An ancient artifact Wudwuds found in the Scarlet Forest. Purely aesthetic in nature. Sparkly Treasure 5 x 99 200z Gathered From Weathered Treasure Nodes at the Scarlet Forest areas 1, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16 and 17. Obtained from Plumpeach Material Retrieval . A rarity of the Scarlet Forest. The fine detail and lavish use of gold show quite advanced techniques. Bulky Treasure 6 x 99 500z Gathered From Bountiful Treasure at the Scarlet Forest areas 1, 13, and 17, only during Bountiful Treasure Emergence . The sheer scale of this Scarlet Forest rarity makes it the object of obsession for all Wudwuds. Queensbloom Pollen 6 x 99 800z Gathered From Queen Rafflesia Nodes at the Scarlet Forest areas 2, 6, 7, 9 and 12. Pollen from a giant flower in the Scarlet Forest, as regal as it is massive. Makes a heady perfume. Auric Oil 5 x 99 500z Gather from Auric Oil nodes at the Oilwell Basin , most commonly during Fallow Season. Exceptionally pure, golden mineral oil from Oilwell Basin. Used widely in Flameborn crafts. Ancient Wyvern Coin 2 x 99 200z Quest Rewards from Aberrant Atrocity and What We Protect quests. Can be gathered at Windward Plains areas 16 and 17 during Fallow, Scarlet Forest areas 6, 8 and 12 during Plenty, Oilwell Basin area 7 during Plenty, Iceshard Cliffs area 5 during Fallow and 20 during Plenty, Ruins of Wyveria area 1 during Wyvern Tranquility and area 6 during Wyvern Stirring, and at the Grand Hub up the Vines across from the Bowling area. A rarity found in the East. A coin bearing a delicate etched relief, long out of use. Antimite 4 x 99 100z Gather from Hopper Crystal Ore Nodes at the Oilwell Basin areas 11, 13 and 14. Obtained From Sabar Material Retrieval . A mineral from Oilwell Basin with a unique sheen. Used by the Flameborn in alloy production. Fine Antimite 5 x 99 200z Gather from Hopper Crystal Ore Nodes at the Oilwell Basin areas 11, 13 and 14. Obtained From Sabar Material Retrieval . An Oilwell Basin rarity too pure to be worked by any but the Flameborn artisans. Antimite Mass 6 x 99 500z Gather from Giant Hopper Crystals at the Oilwell Basin during Giant Hopper Crystal Emergence . A hulking antimite formation that produces strange reactions not yet understood by science. Hirabami Molting 5 x 99 500z Gathered from Hirabami Molting Nodes at te Iceshard Cliffs . Skin shed from a Hirabami. Treasured by the people of the Iceshard Cliffs as a curative. Wyvernscale Vase 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Ancient Relic Nodes at the Iceshard Cliffs areas 5, 12, 15, 16, 18 and 20. Obtained from Apar Material Retrieval. An ancient ornamental vase found in the Iceshard Cliffs. The techniques used to craft it are lost to time. Dragonscale Vase 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Ancient Relic Nodes at the Iceshard Cliffs areas 5, 12, 15, 16, 18 and 20. Obtained from Apar Material Retrieval. Each individual scale ornamenting this vase from the Iceshard Cliffs sparkles with a fiery brilliance. Large Goldenscale Vase 6 x 99 500z Quest Reward from What We Protect optional quest. Gathered from Remarkable Relic Nodes at the Iceshard Cliffs areas 5, 13, 15, 16 and 19 during Remarkable Relic Emergence . An exquisite, inscribed vase from the Iceshard Cliffs. A treasure worthy of kings, lost to the world. Wyveria Lantern 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Mysterious Fruit Nodes at the Ruins of Wyveria areas 1, 3, 5 and 6. Obtained from Rysher Material Retrieval . Fruit encased in a mesh shell, found in the Ruins of Wyveria. A precious source of sustenance to the natives. Mature Wyveria Lantern 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Mysterious Fruit Nodes at the Ruins of Wyveria areas 1, 3, 5 and 6. Obtained from Rysher Material Retrieval . A rarity in the Ruins of Wyveria. The ripening process imbues the fruit with medicinal properties. Origin Wylk Gem 5 x 99 500z Gathered from Wylky Gemstone Nodes at the Ruins of Wyveria areas 7 and 9. A precious find from the Ruins of Wyveria. More transparent than other Wylkdrops and has considerable heft. Milky Cocoon Web 5 x 99 500z Gathered from Cocoon Fiber Nodes at the Ruins of Wyveria areas 1, 7, 13, 14 and 15. A curious fiber found in the Ruins of Wyveria. A resource treasured by the Keepers. Wylk Pebble 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Wylky Gemstone Nodes at the Windward Plains areas 14 and 15, Oilwell Basin area 18 and Ruins of Wyveria areas 1, 4 and 6. Small stones found across the East. A rich source of energy, they are often burned for fuel. Wylk Gem 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Wylky Gemstone Nodes at the Windward Plains areas 14 and 15, Oilwell Basin area 18 and Ruins of Wyveria areas 1, 4 and 6. A beautiful, faintly luminescent stone occasionally found inside Wylkdrops harvested in the East. Time-honed Wylk Gem 6 x 99 500z Gathered from Wylky Crystal Outcrops at Windward Plains area 14, Oilwell Basin area 18 and Ruins of Wyveria areas 4, 6, 7, 9, 10 and 13 during Wylky Crystal Outcrop Emergence . The size of this rare find from the East is the result of an eons- long natural formation process. Ancient Fossil 5 x 99 500z Gathered from Blackened Fossil Nodes at Windward Plains area 16, Oilwell Basin area 15, Iceshard Cliffs area 15 and Ruins of Wyveria area 8. . The blackened, stony remains of old bones unearthed in the East. When polished, it gains a velvety sheen Drifting Sea Pot 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Beautiful Aquatica Nodes at the Windward Plains Zone 14, Scarlet Forest areas 8, 12 and 13. A species of translucent sea squirts found in the East. When salt-dried, it becomes a fine preserved food. Royal Sea Pot 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Beautiful Aquatica Nodes at the Windward Plains Zone 14, Scarlet Forest areas 8, 12 and 13.. A rare, meatier species of sea squirt found in the East. Keeps its rich flavor, even when preserved. Gobletweed 4 x 99 100z Gather from Glass Algae Nodes at the Scarlet Forest. Algae that grows in the East. It resembles a ceremonial cup— Cheers for finding such a beauty! Chaliceweed 5 x 99 200z Gather from Glass Algae Nodes at the Scarlet Forest. Care must be taken not to disturb the delicate form of this rare and stunning algae when harvesting it. Nightflower Pollen 6 x 99 800z Find and gather Ephemeral Blossom during Full Moon at the Windward Plains and Scarlet Forest. Pollen from a flower that blooms under a full moon. It exudes an ethereal pale glow. Fossilized Opal 4 x 99 100z Gathered from Exquisite Fossil Nodes at Ruins of Wyveria. A mass of organic material fossilized into opal over time. It has a deep crimson shine. Fossilized Fire Opal 5 x 99 200z Gathered from Exquisite Fossil Nodes at Ruins of Wyveria. This gorgeous fossil is marked by an exceptionally and fiery opal. A truly radiant rarity. Genesis Opal 6 x 99 500z Gathered from Magnificent Fossils during the Magnificent Fossil Emergence. The opal inclusion in this fossil burns with the fire of creation that first shaped this world. Wyvernsprout 5 x 99 200z Leave Small Monsters corpses to rot for approximatly 5-6 minutes and it might grow some Mycelium on it, but the chance is low. Best way to farm it is by slaying packs of Ceratonoth at the Windward Plains. A parasitic fungus that grows on the bodies of dead monsters. Prized as a symbol of reincarnation. Wyvern Egg 6 x 99 500z Scarlet Forest area 11, Rathalos and Rathian Nest. You need to deliver it back to the camp after gathering te egg, taking care not to break it, best using Ghillie Mantle to not be spotted by the parents as they will attack you in sight. A flying wyvern's egg. Deliver it back to camp...if you can. Misc [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Crushed Crystal 4 x 99 30z Slay an Guardian and wait 5 to 10 minutes (Test Necessary) for it to Cristalize and carve the Cristalized Carcass . It's easier to get an Cristalized Carcass if the Guardian is slain on top of a Wylk Pool. A shard of crystal carved from the carcass of a Guardian. Can be used as a melding material. Cloudy Crystal 6 x 99 50z Slay an Guardian and wait around 5 to 10 minutes (Test Necessary) for it to Cristalize and carve the Cristalized Carcass . It's easier to get an Cristalized Carcass if the Guardian is slain on top of a Wylk Pool. A hazy crystal carved from the carcass of a Guardian. Can be used as a melding material. Coruscating Crystal 6 x 99 70z Slay an Guardian and wait around 5 to 10 minutes (Test Necessary) for it to Cristalize and carve the Cristalized Carcass . It's easier to get an Cristalized Carcass if the Guardian is slain on top of a Wylk Pool. A glittering crystal carved from the carcass of a Guardian. Can be used as a melding material. Wyverian Bloodstone Shard 6 x 99 80z Destroy the Tempered Wound of a 5 Stars difficulty Tempered Monster ( Balahara , Chatacabra , Congalala , Gypceros , Hirabami , Lala Barina , Nerscylla Quematrice , Rathian , Rompopolo and Yian Kut-Ku ). Obtained from destroying a tempered wound. Has a deep sanguine hue. Can be used as a melding material. Wyverian Bloodstone (S) 6 x 99 90z Destroy the Tempered Wound of a 5 or 6 Stars difficulty Tempered Monster ( Ajarakan , Balahara , Blangonga , Chatacabra , Congalala , Doshaguma , Guardian Doshaguma , Gravios , Guardian Ebony Odogaron , Guardian Fulgur Anjanath , Gypceros , Hirabami , Lala Barina , Nerscylla Quematrice , Rathalos , Guardian Rathalos , Rathian , Rompopolo , Xu Wu and Yian Kut-Ku ). Obtained from destroying a tempered wound. Has a deep sanguine hue. Can be used as a melding material. Wyverian Bloodstone 7 x 99 100z Destroy the Tempered Wound of a 6 or 7 Stars difficulty Tempered Monster ( Ajarakan , Blangonga , Doshaguma , Guardian Doshaguma , Gore Magala , [Gravios]], Guardian Ebony Odogaron , Guardian Fulgur Anjanath , Jin Dahaad , Nu Udra , Rathalos , Guardian Rathalos , Rey Dau , Uth Duna and Xu Wu . Obtained from destroying a tempered wound. Has a deep sanguine hue. Can be used as a melding material. Wyverian Bloodstone (L) 7 x 99 110z Destroy the Tempered Wound of a 6, 7 or 8 Stars difficulty Tempered Monster ( Ajarakan , Arkveld , Blangonga , Doshaguma , Guardian Doshaguma , Gore Magala , [Gravios]], Guardian Ebony Odogaron , Guardian Fulgur Anjanath , Jin Dahaad , Mizutsune , Nu Udra , Rathalos , Guardian Rathalos , Rey Dau , Uth Duna and Xu Wu ). Obtained from destroying a tempered wound. Larger than most of its type. Can be used as a melding material. Wyverian Bloodstone Chunk 8 x 99 120z Destroy the Tempered Wound of a 7 or 8 Stars difficulty Tempered Monster ( Arkveld , Gore Magala , Jin Dahaad , Mizutsune , Nu Udra , Rey Dau and Uth Duna . Obtained from destroying a tempered wound. One of the largest of its kind. Can be used as a melding material. Steel Melding Ticket 5 x 99 10z Challenge Quest Reward: Doshaguma of the Hollow . A ticket used by Wyverians. Hand it over when melding decorations to get a slight discount. Silver Melding Ticket 6 x 99 50z Obtained via completing Weekly Bounties outside of Blossomdance Festival. A ticket used by Wyverians. Hand it over when melding decorations to get a discount. Gold Melding Ticket 7 x 99 100z Trade Nightflower Pollen with Sekka at Suja, Peaks of Accord. A ticket used by Wyverians. Hand it over when melding decorations to get a great discount. Steel Relic Text 5 x 99 10z Obtained via completing Weekly Bounties. A ticket used by Wyverians. Hand it over when melding relics to get a slight discount. Silver Relic Text 6 x 99 50z Obtained via completing Weekly Bounties. A ticket used by Wyverians. Hand it over when melding relics to get a discount. Gold Relic Text 7 x 99 100z Trade Nightflower Pollen with Sekka at Suja, Peaks of Accord or 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout. A ticket used by Wyverians. Hand it over when melding relics to get a great discount. Pick-a-meal Voucher 5 x 99 500z Obtained from Login Bonuses at the Palico Support Desk or via completing Weekly Bounties. Extra rewards from Sakuratide Armor Set Bonus Exchange this voucher in the Grand Hub Canteen for one order of your favorite regional meal. Kunafa Meal Voucher 4 x 99 400z Obtained from Login Bonuses at the Palico Support Desk or via completing Weekly Bounties. Exchange this voucher in the Grand Hub Canteen for one order of the Kunafa regional meal. Azuz Meal Voucher 4 x 99 400z Obtained from Login Bonuses at the Palico Support Desk or via completing Weekly Bounties. Exchange this voucher in the Grand Hub Canteen for one order of the Azuz regional meal. Sild Meal Voucher 4 x 99 400z Obtained from Login Bonuses at the Palico Support Desk or via completing Weekly Bounties. Exchange this voucher in the Grand Hub Canteen for one order of the Sild regional meal. Suja Meal Voucher 4 x 99 400z Obtained from Login Bonuses at the Palico Support Desk or via completing Weekly Bounties. Exchange this voucher in the Grand Hub Canteen for one order of the Suja regional meal. Blossomdance Meal Voucher 4 x 99 400z Obtained from Login Bonuses at the Palico Support Desk or via completing Weekly Bounties during Blossomdance Festival. Extra rewards from Sakuratide Armor Set Bonus A voucher usable only during the Blossomdance. Exchange it for a festive meal. Misc [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Sinister Cloth 6 x 99 200z Acquire from Murtabak Material Retrieval . Trade Great Windward Aloe with Kilama at Kunafa Village or 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at the Wudwud Hideout when available. Suspicious cloth found somewhere in the Windward Plains. Drips with an aura of pure evil. Great Hornfly 6 x 99 200z Event Quest Daughters of Carabosse reward. Obtained from Plumpeach Material Retrieval . Found in the Scarlet Forest. An insect with a giant horn, huge shell, and butterfly wings. Drearisite Scraps 6 x 99 200z Obtained from Sabar Material Retrieval . Trade 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Antimite Mass with Dogard at Azuz, Eternal Forge. Metal scraps manufactured in Azuz. Can be used as a material once smelted. Scarred Scale 6 x 99 200z Obtained from Apar Material Retrieval . Trade 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Large Goldenscale Vase with Sekka at Suja, Peaks of Accord. A material found in the Iceshard Cliffs. Despite its scarring, it remains tough as any other scale. Great Hibiscus 6 x 99 200z Obtained from Rysher Material Retrieval . Trade 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Fossilized Fire Opal with Ren at Sild, The Keeper's Vigil. A large, brightly colored flower found in the Ruins of Wyveria. Spreads its seeds through the air. Dalthydon Wool 6 x 99 350z Trade 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Pure Fulgurite , Thunder Fulgurite or Fine Windward Aloe with Kilama at Kunafa. A product of Kunafa. Perfectly suited for desert life. Try bringing it to the Smithy. Azuz Tanned Leather 6 x 99 350z Trade 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout, Fine Antimite with Dogard or Wylk Gem or Time-honed Wylk Gem with Yabran , both at Azuz, The Everforge. A product of Azuz. The leather is repeatedly repaired for extended use. Try taking it to the Smithy. Suja Textiles 6 x 99 350z Trade 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Dragonscale Vase with Sekka at Suja, Peaks of Accord. A product of Suja. Its unique pattern has roots in Wyverian tradition. Try taking it to the Smithy. Sild Cotton 6 x 99 350z Trade 10x Ancient Wyvern Coin with Gawdygog at Wudwud Hideout or Genesis Opal , Mature Wyveria Lanter or Fossilized Fire Opal with Ren at Sild, The Keeper's Vigil. A product of Sild. A high-quality material that can be used as-is. Try bringing it to the Smithy. Gajau Hide 4 x 99 200z Obtained from catching Gajaus . The hide of a Gajau. Covered in a thick slime that grants water resistance. Speartune Fin 4 x 99 200z Obtained from catching Speartunas . The sharp fin of a Speartuna. Might be useful for something if you bring it to the Smithy. Commission Ticket 6 x 99 350z Purchase from the Support Ship when it arrives at the Windward Plains camp. A ticket in the image of a hunter who traveled to the New World. Try taking it to the Smithy. Expedition Headgear Ticket 6 x 99 350z Event Quest Fire Hidden by Sand reward. A ticket inscribed with the emblem of the expedition. Give it to the Smithy to get special equipment. Amstrigian Ticket 6 x 99 350z Event Quest When Do Quematrice Sing? reward. A ticket depicting the ecology of Amstrigian. Give it to the Smithy to get special equipment. Mimiphyta Ticket 6 x 99 350z Event Quest Kut-Ku Gone Cuckoo reward. A ticket depicting the ecology of Mimiphyta. Give it to the Smithy to get special equipment. Chata Coin 6 x 99 300z Complete Arena: Chatacabra. A coin given to those who have bested a Chatacabra in the Arena. Rathian Coin 6 x 99 400z Complete Arena: Rathian. A coin given to those who have bested a Rathian in the Arena. Pinnacle Coin 6 x 99 500z Complete either Arena: Chatacabra or Arena: Rathian. A commemorative coin bestowed on hunters who have mastered the craft. The value of its sheen? Priceless. Trade-in Materials [ ] Item Rarity Capacity Value How to Get Description Golden Scale 4 x 99 1000z Fishing Goldenfish . A Goldenfish scale. They shimmer like only pure gold can. Platinum Scale 4 x 99 2000z Fishing Platinumfish . A Platinumfish scale. They give off a beautiful gleam. Krano Copper 4 x 99 500z Can be dropped from Kranodath at the Oilwell Basin. Copper pyrite from a Kranodath's shell. Its luster makes it a prime material for decorations. Krano Pyrite 6 x 99 1500z Can be dropped from Kranodath at the Oilwell Basin, High Rank only. High-quality copper pyrite from a Kranodath's shell. Its brilliant sheen is stunning to behold. Steel Egg 4 x 99 1000z Purchasable from the Support Ship . Event Quest When Do Quematrice Sing? reward An egg of glittering silver. Rare but useless to hunters. Sells for a very good price. Golden Egg 4 x 99 20000z Purchasable from the Support Ship . # MHWilds: Charm List

MHWilds: Weapons ・ MHWilds: Armors ・ MHWilds: Monsters ・ MHWilds: Monster Material List ・ MHWilds: Palico Gear ・ MHWilds: Locations ・ MHWilds: Skills ・ MHWilds: Item List ・ MHWilds: Assigned Quests ・ MHWilds: Optional Quests ・ MHWilds: Event Quests ・ MHWilds: Endemic Life List ・ MHWilds: Decorations ・ MHWilds: Charm List Charms are special items that can be crafted from the Smithy. These pieces of gear grant Armor Skill Points when equipped. Charms can be upgraded using monster materials, which increases the number of Skill Points granted by that Charm. Using Decorations and Charms, you can customize a set with a whole new skill, improve a skill it already has, and much more. # MHWilds: High Rank Armor

MHWilds: Weapons ・ MHWilds: Armors ・ MHWilds: Monsters ・ MHWilds: Monster Material List ・ MHWilds: Palico Gear ・ MHWilds: Locations ・ MHWilds: Skills ・ MHWilds: Item List ・ MHWilds: Assigned Quests ・ MHWilds: Optional Quests ・ MHWilds: Event Quests ・ MHWilds: Endemic Life List ・ MHWilds: Decorations ・ MHWilds: Charm List A list of all the High Rank Armor Sets available in the game. Armor Sets listed here are sorted by each Armor's Rarity and in-game order. For other types of Armor that are not listed here, please refer to the main page. For further detailed information, please refer to the individual Armor's article. A link is found above the Armor Set's image or by clicking the image itself. # MHWilds: Event Armor

MHWilds: Weapons ・ MHWilds: Armors ・ MHWilds: Monsters ・ MHWilds: Monster Material List ・ MHWilds: Palico Gear ・ MHWilds: Locations ・ MHWilds: Skills ・ MHWilds: Item List ・ MHWilds: Assigned Quests ・ MHWilds: Optional Quests ・ MHWilds: Event Quests ・ MHWilds: Endemic Life List ・ MHWilds: Decorations ・ MHWilds: Charm List A list of all the Event Armor Sets available in the game. These Armor Sets can be obtained from completing Event Quests , special collaborations, or rewards during seasonal events. Armor Sets listed here are sorted by each Armor's Rarity and in-game order. For other types of Armor that are not listed here, please refer to the main page. For further detailed information, please refer to the individual Armor's article. A link is found above the Armor Set's image or by clicking the image itself.
