# MHWilds: Event Quests

MHWilds: Weapons ・ MHWilds: Armors ・ MHWilds: Monsters ・ MHWilds: Monster Material List ・ MHWilds: Palico Gear ・ MHWilds: Locations ・ MHWilds: Skills ・ MHWilds: Item List ・ MHWilds: Assigned Quests ・ MHWilds: Optional Quests ・ MHWilds: Event Quests ・ MHWilds: Endemic Life List ・ MHWilds: Decorations ・ MHWilds: Charm List Contents 1 Notes: 2 Low Rank 2.1 1 Star 2.2 2 Star 3 High Rank 3.1 4 Star 3.2 5 Star 3.3 6 Star 3.4 7 Star 3.5 8 Star 3.6 9 Star 3.7 10 Star Notes: See the official site for more information. As of Version 1.041, all event quests save Just What the Doctor Ordered and the ingredient quests are permanent, and most event quests save 9-star Tempered monsters and the newest quests can be undertaken offline. Low Rank [ ] 1 Star [ ] Careening Out of Control 螺旋とうねりの試運転 Main Objective : Hunt the Balahara Location : Windward Plains Season : Fallow Reward : 4320z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR2+ Monsters: Balahara Chatacabra , Quematrice , Doshaguma Description : I saw some Sandfolk caught in the middle of a pack of Balahara in the Windward Plains. The Guild has authorized you to hunt them and will reward you with an Armor Sphere if you succeed. - Kanya 2 Star [ ] Chemicus Nocturnus 暗闇からケミーコス Main Objective : Hunt the Rompopolo Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Fallow Reward : 5760z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR3+ Monsters: Rompopolo Rompopolo , Ajarakan Description : Rompopolo are rampaging in the Oilwell Basin. You've been authorized to hunt them before they can cause any major damage. To sweeten the deal, you'll get some gathering materials as a reward. - Alma High Rank [ ] 4 Star [ ] Neon Neopterons 七色のかばね Main Objective : Slay 15&#160;????? Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 15120z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR16+ Monsters: ????? None Description : I've got a...colorful challenge for you. Let's just say, "a rainbow of bold hues will brighten your day!" Special rewards await - seven varities, collected one by one. I've also stocked you up on Flash Pods for the task. - Cruz Notes : Rewards one of seven random Jigglysquirm pendants on completion. Defeat limit set at 9. Kut-Ku Gone Cuckoo 豊穣清浄、怪鳥上々 Main Objective : Hunt the Yian Kut-Ku Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Plenty Reward : 12960z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Yian Kut-Ku Yian Kut-Ku (5) Description : Yian Kut-Ku numbers have exploded this season of Plenty, wreaking havoc on the ecosystem. They can't go unchecked... You've been authorized to hunt them. I'd be happy to give you materials for a special piece of equipment in return. - Erik Notes : Rewards the Mimiphyta Ticket to craft the Mimiphyta α . Like a Fire Hidden by Sand 砂がくれにし夜半の火影 Main Objective : Hunt the Rathian Location : Windward Plains Season : Plenty Reward : 15840z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Rathian Doshaguma , Quematrice (2), Chatacabra Description : Rumors are spreading in Kunafa about a ball of fire that dances among the plains at night. My guess is that it's from a Rathian. You've been authorized to hunt it before it can cause any damage. I can give you some materials for a special piece of equipment in return. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Expedition Headgear Ticket to craft the Expedition Headgear α . When Do Quematrice Sing? 炎尾竜はいつ歌う？ Main Objective : Hunt the Quematrice Location : Windward Plains Season : Plenty Reward : 12240z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Quematrice Chatacabra (2), Rathian Description : A Quematrice is rampaging in the Windward Plains. It's disturbing the local wildlife and impacting the regular mating season. If you take care of it, I'll give you materials for a special piece of equipment! - Alma Notes : Rewards the Amstrigian Ticket to craft the Amstrigian α . Daughters of Carabosse カラボスの娘達 Main Objective : Hunt 2 Lala Barina Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 28080z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR16+ Monsters: Lala Barina (2) None Description : Numerous Lala Barina are gathering in the Wounded Hollow. You've been authorized to start pruning to stop them from making the area into a deadly flower field. I'll give you materials for a special piece of equipment in return. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Blossom Ticket to craft the Blossom α Armor . Three Tails Better Than None 三人寄ればケマトリス！ Main Objective : Hunt 3 Quematrice Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 29160z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR16+ Monsters: Quematrice (3) None Description : Oh, no! Three troublesome chickens are pecking on everyone's nerves in Suja. Me, May, and Toh don't know what to do, but we'll give ya some special equipment if you can think of something! - Support Team Member Tom Notes : Rewards the Felyne Ticket to craft the Faux Felyne α . Pick Your Poison 毒をもって毒が二倍 Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Firespring Reward : 29520z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Gypceros and Rompopolo Rathian , Rathalos Description : It's bad enough that it's hotter than an Ajarakan's armpit, but now we got two monsters spewing poison everywhere. I'm not trying to be sweaty AND poisoned, so if you could take care of those two for me, I'll give you some materials for some special equipment. - Quinn Notes : Rewards the Diving Ticket to craft the Diver α Armor . Hirabami Harvest ヒラバミ達の収穫祭 Main Objective : Hunt 3 Hirabami Location : Iceshard Cliffs Season : Fallow Reward : 30960z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Hirabami (3) Gypceros , Blangonga , Nerscylla Description : Hirabami have been observed forming a large group. Balance must be restored before they permanently alter the ecosystem. The Guild has authorized you to hunt them, and will compensate you with materials for a special piece of equipment. - Quinn Notes : Rewards the Harvest Ticket to craft the Harvest α Armor . Stomping Supper 晩飯時のイグニッション Main Objective : Hunt the Quematrice Location : Windward Plains Season : Plenty Reward : 12240z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Quematrice Chatacabra , Doshaguma , Balahara (2) Description : Quematrice have been sighted near Kunafa and some Sandfolk have already been injured. If you resolve the situation, they say they're willing to treat you to a meal. - Alma Notes : Ingredient rewards: Kunafa Cheese, Sharp Kunafa Cheese, Wild Herb, Wild Seed Oil, Jeweled Mullet Roe Congalala Cravings ババコンガ、垂涎のアレを好む Main Objective : Hunt the Congalala Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Fallow Reward : 13320z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Congalala Rathian , Rathalos Description : Congalala are after the Wudwuds' beloved mushrooms. They say if you do a "big help" for them, they'd be happy to share some special ingredients with you. - Erik Notes : Ingredient rewards: Droolshroom, Delishroom, Eastern Honey, Wild Seed Oil, Truffle Du Conga Romping Around 狂おしくもププロポル Main Objective : Hunt the Rompopolo Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Plenty Reward : 13680z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Rompopolo Nerscylla , Gypceros Description : A rampaging Rompopolo is threatening Azuz's Firespring Festival! Please take care of it before anyone gets hurt. The people of Azuz are willing to give you ingredients in return! - Alma Notes : Ingredient rewards: Mud Shrimp, Turbid Shrimp, Wild Herb, Eastern Honey, Jeweled Mullet Roe Peak Nerscylla 影蜘蛛、頂を歩く Main Objective : Hunt the Nerscylla Location : Iceshard Cliffs Season : Fallow Reward : 14760z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Nerscylla Blangonga , Hirabami (2), Gypceros Description : A Nerscylla has been sighted outside its usual territory in the Iceshard Cliffs and may soon become a threat to the people of Suja. The villagers say they'll be happy to share some ingredients with you if you resolve the problem. Sounds like a sweet deal to me. - Cruz Notes : Ingredient rewards: Fluffy Egg, Airy Egg, Monster Chili, Wild Seed Oil, Jeweled Mullet Roe 5 Star [ ] Sand-Scarred Soul 砂傷だらけの荒者魂 Main Objective : Hunt the Doshaguma Location : Windward Plains Season : Fallow Reward : 15840z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Doshaguma Gypceros , Balahara (2), Quematrice Description : Doshaguma are one of the greatest threats facing Kunafa. Let's do what we can to ensure the villagers' safety. Apparently, the Guild will reward you with a decoration in return. - Alma Anguish and Atrocity 哀愁と暴虐の白き獣 Main Objective : Hunt the Guardian Doshaguma Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Wakening Reward : 18000z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Guardian Doshaguma Guardian Rathalos , Guardian Ebony Odogaron , Xu Wu Description : We don't know nearly enough about the Guardians yet. The Guild will offer you HRP, which you can use to increase your HR, in exchange for more information. - Erik Tongue-Tied その舌はとても強情 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Chatacabra Location : Windward Plains Season : Fallow Reward : 14760z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Tempered Chatacabra Doshaguma herd, Quematrice , Balahara Description : I saw some Sandfolk out in the Windward Plains who looked like they were about to meet the business end of a Chatacabra tongue. A hunt's been authorized, and the Guild will reward you with Armor Spheres if you succeed. - Kanya Ballet in the Rain バヨネットが踊る雨 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Lala Barina Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Downpour Reward : 15120z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Tempered Lala Barina Doshaguma , Rathian , Rathalos , Congalala Description : An extremely powerful Lala Barina has appeared in the Scarlet Forest, threatening to destroy the balance of the ecosystem there. The Guild will reward you with a decoration if you take care of it. - Erik Where You'd Least Expect 隠れ場所は油断の隙間 Main Objective : Hunt the Xu Wu Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Tranquility Reward : 19080z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Xu Wu Guardian Fulgur Anjanath , Tempered Quematrice , Tempered Congalala , Tempered Nerscylla Description : As people tasked with keeping an eye on the Guardians, the Keepers find the elusive Xu Wu particularly unsettling. If you deal with it for them, they'll give you some ingredients in return. Isn't that nice of them? - Hadewych Notes : Ingredient rewards: Sild Garlic, Specialty Sild Garlic, Wild Herb, Wild Seed Oil, Jeweled Mullet Roe Running Wild 封印を解いた暴れん坊 Main Objective : Hunt the Guardian Fulgur Anjanath Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Stirring Reward : 16920z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Guardian Fulgur Anjanath Guardian Doshaguma , Tempered Quematrice , Tempered Lala Barina Description : A Guardian Fulgur Anjanath has awoken from its slumber and made its way to Wyveria. Be warned: it's a wild one. If you can take care of it, I'll give you materials for a special piece of equipment! - Alma Notes : Rewards the Sealed Dragon Cloth to craft the Sealed Dragon Cloth α . Kut-Ku the Forest Conqueror 森の覇者、それはイャンクック Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Yian Kut-Ku Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Downpour Reward : 15840z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Tempered Yian Kut-Ku Lala Barina , Congalala , Rathian , Doshaguma Description : According to the Wudwuds, a monster they call the "Pectator of Doom and Chaos" is terrorizing the forest? I... think they might be talking about a Yian Kut-Ku. Well, either way, if you give them a hand, you'll get some special equipment. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Wudwud Treasure to craft the Wudwud Guise α and Wacky Wudwud α Palico armor. Putting Up a Stink 桃色気分が私を焦がす Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Downpour Reward : 39960z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Tempered Congalala and Tempered Rathian Tempered Yian Kut-Ku , Doshaguma , Lala Barina Description : According to the Wudwuds, a "pinky stinky" is fighting a "screamy queeny" near Honey Mountain. Sounds like a pretty sticky situation... I've got some materials for a special equipment prepared for when you return, but only after you've had a bath... - Alma Notes : Rewards the Flamefete Catalog to craft the &#160; Cornpopper , Half Rim Glasses α , and Lovely Shades α . The Melodic Monarch 碧落に咆を奏でたり Main Objective : Hunt the Rathalos Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 21240z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR16+ Monsters: Rathalos None Description : A Rathalos has appeared in the Wounded Hollow. You can almost hear a triumphant melody being played in honor of the King of the Skies' arrival. There's a very special reward in store for this one. (First time completion only) - Erik Notes : Rewards the Fender Rathalos Telecaster gestures. A Vile Visage 蛮行容貌 Main Objective : Capture the Alpha Doshaguma Location : Windward Plains Season : Fallow Reward : 20160z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR9+ Monsters: Alpha Doshaguma Doshaguma herd, Balahara , Chatacabra Description : One of those Bashaguma-wait...Doshaguma. It's Doshaguma, right? Right... Anyway, one from the forest has been strutting around the plains like it owns the place. The Guild authorizes its capture to send it back home! Oh, and I'll give you materials to make special equipment for your troubles! - Kanya Notes : Rewards the Doshaguma Sketch to craft the Doshagumask α . Congalala Courting Carols 桃毛達も歌う恋歌 Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Fallow Reward : 30960z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR21+ Monsters: Tempered Congalala , Congalala (2) Doshaguma , Tempered Yian Kut-Ku , Lala Barina Description : There are so many Congalala that I feel like I'm swimming in a sea of pink. If the Hymstrigian's habitat gets any more corrupted, the entire ecosystem may collapse. I'm willing to provide materials for a special piece of equipment if you help. - Kanya Notes : Rewards the Songbird Sketch to craft the Felyne Hymstrigian α set. 6 Star [ ] King of a Faraway Sky 異国の空と王 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Guardian Rathalos Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Stirring Reward : 20520z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Tempered Guardian Rathalos Tempered Rathalos , Tempered Quematrice , Tempered Ajarakan , Tempered Gravios Description : We don't know nearly enough about the more powerful Guardians yet. I'll gladly give you some unique equipment parts if you can find out more. Just make sure you're fully prepared before you head out! - Erik That Won't Work on Me! その閃光は私に効かない Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Xu Wu Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Wakening Reward : 23040z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Tempered Xu Wu Guardian Ebony Odogaron , Tempered Gravios , Tempered Doshaguma Description : A Xu Wu has been sighted within Wyveria. Remember that flash won't have any effect. You may want to look over your gear before heading out. Oh, and I have some materials for a special piece of equipment to give you when you come back. Pretty exciting, right? - Alma Notes : Rewards the Blossomdance Catalog to craft the Sealed Eyepatch α , Shadow Shades α , and Round Glasses α . Gravios Blockade 極熱重鎧グラビモス Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Gravios Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 23040z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Tempered Gravios None Description : A Gravios in the Wounded Hollow is blocking the scheduled food deliveries to the place of prayer. If you deal with it, you'll be able to get your hands on ingredients from tons of different places! - Blazej Notes : Ingredient rewards: Kunafa Cheese, Droolshroom, Mud Shrimp, Fluffy Egg, Sild Garlic An Inferno Laid Bare 燃えろ、ネイキッドボディ Main Objective : Hunt the Nu Udra Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Firespring Reward : 22320z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Nu Udra Rathalos , Ajarakan (2), Gravios Description : A fiery breeze rolled in hot enough to make you want to strip down. Turns out it was a Nu Udra with a temper that'd singe the hairs off my chest. The hunt's authorized, and I've got some hot materials to craft even hotter equipment for you in return. - Cruz Notes : Rewards the Necklace Ticket to craft the Pinion Necklace α and the Felyne Bell Collar α Palico armor. The Claws Are Out 解き放たれた兇爪 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Guardian Ebony Odogaron Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Tranquility Reward : 21600z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Tempered Guardian Ebony Odogaron Tempered Gravios , Tempered Gypceros , Tempered Rathalos , Xu Wu Description : A ferocious Guardian Ebony Odogaron has been sighted in Wyveria. It's too dangerous to let such an aggressive monster roam free. I'll have some materials you can use to make special equipment once the threat has been dealt with. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Toe Bean Ticket to craft the Toe Bean Mittens α . Eldrich Enigma 収棘のエニグマ Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Xu Wu Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 24120z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Tempered Xu Wu None Description : A rogue Xu Wu seems to have wandered into the Wounded Hollow, and a particularly strong one at that. The Guild has authorized you to hunt it in addition to providing ample HRP as compensation. - Hadewych Wreaking Havoc in Wyveria 白い暴れん坊、手に負えない Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Guardian Fulgur Anjanath Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Tranquility Reward : 21600z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Tempered Guardian Fulgur Anjanath Guardian Doshaguma (2), Tempered Congalala Description : Anjanath are notorious troublemakers, and there's a Guardian subspecies looking to do just that in the Ruins of Wyveria. It needs to be dealt with before it sniffs out the rich Wyvern Milk in the village. The Guild will reward you with Armor Spheres upon completion. - Hadewych Shining Blades Against the Dull Wasteland 千の光はすべて刃 Main Objective : Hunt the Seregios Location : Windward Plains Season : Sandtide Reward : 19800z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Seregios Rey Dau , Doshaguma , Tempered Doshaguma , Balahara Description : A Seregios has been sighted in the Windward Plains during the Inclemency. It's angry. Very angry. Which is understandable... if I had all that sand up my — *ahem* Either way, The Guild authorizes you to neutralize the threat. You will be rewarded with some decorations upon completion. - Cruz No More Mister Ice Guy 白き王子の豪勇魂 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Blangonga Location : Iceshard Cliffs Season : Frostwinds Reward : 20160z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR31+ Monsters: Tempered Blangonga Jin Dahaad , Gypceros , Tempered Hirabami herd Description : An impressive-looking Blangonga has been sighted during a blizzard. That sort of anomalous weather combined with such a commanding aura is a recipe for disaster. The Guild is offering decorations as a reward for quelling this threat. - Alma 7 Star [ ] Endless Sky, Endless Sea 天滄無窮 Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 47160z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Lagiacrus , Tempered Rathalos None Description : Where the vast stretches of sky meet the vastness of the sea, a chance to usurp two rulers falls upon thee. Steel thy resolve and fight wholeheartedly, and the Guild shall reward Armor Spheres if thou returnest victoriously. - Hadewych 8 Star [ ] Masterless Claws 主亡き爪 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Guardian Ebony Odogaron Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Tranquility Reward : 23400z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Guardian Ebony Odogaron Tempered Xu Wu , Tempered Lala Barina , Tempered Guardian Fulgur Anjanath , Tempered Guardian Doshaguma Description : A vicious Guardian Ebony Odogaron is strutting around the deserted capital with no one to keep it in check. Purposeless Guardians are exceedingly dangerous. Word is you'll get some unique equipment for dealing with it. - Hadewych Hungry for Ore? 大好物は鉱石です！！ Main Objective : Hunt 2 Tempered Gravios Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 55440z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Gravios (2) None Description : Not one, but TWO Gravios have been spotted out in the Wounded Hollow, and while they're on the small side, they're still quite dangerous. As a reward, you'll receive some materials that can be used to forge special equipment. Then you can mine to your heart's content! - Blazej Notes : Rewards the Worn Pickaxe to craft the &#160; Scavenger Pickaxe and &#160; Mining Pickaxe . Both Gravios are Gold Crown Small. Frenzy or Be Frenzied Upon 狂威の食うか食われるか Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 40680z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Frenzied Nerscylla and Frenzied Gypceros N/A Description : Frenzied monsters have invaded Wounded Hollow, specifically Nerscylla and Gypceros, who are symbiotic hunters. They must be dealt with quickly, so you've been authorized to hunt them. You'll receive materials for a special piece of equipment in return. - Cruz Notes : Rewards the Skull Ticket to craft the Skull Mask α . That Won't Faze Me! ぬるい光は私に不要 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Gypceros Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Plenty Reward : 17280z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Gypceros Tempered Ajarakan (2), Tempered Rompopolo , Tempered Gravios Description : A powerful Gypceros has been sighted in the Oilwell Basin, and has harmed a number of Azuz miners with its flashes and poison. The Guild has prepared materials for a special piece of equipment as a reward for dealing with this issue. I'm so excited to see it! - Alma Notes : Rewards the Dreamspell Catalog to craft the Gelidron α Armor , Aviator Shades α , and Kitten Frames α . Meat at the Heart of Wyveria 竜都の中心で肉を焦がした者 Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Stirring Reward : 44640z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Quematrice and Tempered Rathalos Tempered Gravios , Tempered Quematrice , Guardian Rathalos (2) Description : A powerful Quematrice and Rathalos have appeared in Wyveria. If the Wyvern Milk there ignites, the entire place could burn to the ground. Materials for a special piece of equipment will be provided as compensation for your aid. - Blazej Notes : Rewards the Well-done Steak Recipe Book to craft the &#160; Tasty Blades . Rewards the Well-done Steak Strap pendant on first completion. It's Darker than You Think 王と私は眩闇を知る Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Wakening Reward : 57240z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Guardian Rathalos and Tempered Rathalos Tempered Gravios , Tempered Gypceros (2), Tempered Seregios Description : Two Kings of the Skies. Two witnesses to the darkness and light of history. The Guild authorizes you to hunt them, and stands ready to reward you with materials for crafting special equipment. This is exciting! - Alma Notes : Rewards the Lumenhymn Catalog to craft the Blessed Waistchain α , Analytic E.Y.E. α , and Mirror Visor α . Lalas and Toads and Bears, Oh My! 痺れる森の野獣 Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Fallow Reward : 45360z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Lala Barina and Tempered Doshaguma Tempered Congalala (3) Description : Seems like a lot is going on in the Scarlet Forest at the moment. In addition to a Paratoad outbreak, we've got a Lala Barina and Doshaguma running amok. Bring balance back to the forest and you'll be rewarded with materials to craft special equipment. - Quinn Notes : Rewards the Felyne Wanted Poster to craft the &#160; Catspaw and the Felyne Thief α Palico set. The Lala Barina is Gold Crown Large and the Doshaguma is Gold Crown Small. Playing the Long Game 長いものには巻かれてござれ Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 50040z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Mizutsune and Tempered Balahara None Description : Some slithering slender monsters have converged on the Wounded Hollow. To protect the nearby residents, the Guild authorizes you to hunt these monsters down to size. I'm told you'll be rewarded with materials to craft special equipment if you make short work of 'em! - Hadewych Notes : Rewards the Wudwud Likey-like to craft the Eager Wudwud α . The Mizutsune is Gold Crown Small and the Balahara is Gold Crown Large. The Snow Has Teeth 霜烈のホワイトアウト Main Objective : Hunt 3 Tempered Blangonga Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 80640z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Blangonga (3) None Description : Forecast for the Wounded Hollow is not looking so good. Multiple Blangonga are on the loose, but it's not clear how many as visiblity has dropped to zero in a blizzard of fur and fangs. The Guild authorizes you to clear them out. They've already arranged for your reward: materials to craft special equipment. - Cruz Notes : Rewards the Orion Ticket to craft the Orion α Armor . Two of the Blangongas are Gold Crown Large and one is Gold Crown Small. Every Hunter's Dream ハンター達の永い夢 Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 107280z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Mizutsune , Tempered Quematrice (4) None Description : Today is the day every hunter dreams about - a day to bear the dreams of all living things. In return for taking this on, you'll receive materials for a special piece of equipment that's endorsed by engineers everywhere. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Master Craftsman's Blueprint to craft the &#160; Shatterseal . Rewards the Meatmergency! pendant on first completion. Also rewards all three Hunter Symbols! Razzle Dazzle Frazzle 光彩陸離の輝きよ！ Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 50760z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Gypceros and Tempered Rey Dau None Description : It's a dazzling time, and dazzling times call for dazzling quests! You might just come out of this one glowing literally AND figuratively. And your reward? Materials for crafting special equipment. - Erik Notes : Rewards the Gala Suit Ticket to craft the Gala Suit α Armor . A Flash of Brilliance 閃電猛りて、その粋やよし！ Main Objective : Hunt all target monsters Location : Wounded Hollow Season : N/A Reward : 58680z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR41+ Monsters: Tempered Lagiacrus and Tempered Rey Dau None Description : I have to admire you, Hunter - it's really "flashy" of you to take on this quest! That bright spirit of yours is something I'm sure people will remember for ages. You'll earn equally flashy rewards from this quest that can be made into some brilliant new equipment. Good luck! - Alma Notes : Rewards the Azure Stargem to craft the &#160; Azure Star Blade , &#160; Azure Era Wyrmbow , and the Azure Age α Armor . A Silent Flash 無言の閃耀 Main Objective : Hunt the Arch-Tempered Rey Dau Location : Windward Plains Season : Sandtide Reward : 30960z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR50+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Rey Dau Chatacabra , Quematrice , Balahara , Tempered Doshaguma Description : An extremely powerful Rey Dau has been sighted in the Windward Plains. Only the most elite hunters are equipped to take on this quest. May good fortune be with you as you aim to be one of those select few. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Rey Dau Certificate γ to craft the Rey γ Armor . These Roots Run Deep 漣の古き都に眠れば愛し Main Objective : Hunt the Arch-Tempered Uth Duna Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Downpour Reward : 33480z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR50+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Uth Duna Tempered Rathalos , Doshaguma , Mizutsune , Tempered Yian Kut-Ku Description : An extremely powerful Uth Duna has been sighted in the Scarlet Forest. Such a terrifying yet majestic presence... Facing it will not be for the faint of heart. May good fortune be with you - we've yet to witness the power of this region's true apex. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Uth Duna Certificate γ to craft the Duna γ Armor . 9 Star [ ] Specter of Their Sins 咎は戦禍に睡臥する Main Objective : Slay the Gogmazios Location : Forgotten Machineworks Season : N/A Reward : 39600z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+, complete "Ghosts Pay No Heed to Tomorrow" Monsters: Gogmazios None Description : A Gogmazios has been sighted in the Forgotten Machineworks. All hunters in the Forbidden Lands are to gather there to combat this threat with the Guild's authorization to slay it. Dislodge the ancient Convergent Elderbreaker and use it to prevail. Good luck to you all. - Alma Sovereign Brute 狼藉なるものの武弁 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Doshaguma Location : Windward Plains Season : Plenty Reward : 33120z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Tempered Doshaguma Rathian , Quematrice , Chatacabra , Balahara Description : A vicious-looking Doshaguma has turned up in the Windward Plains, putting the whole ecosystem in danger. The Guild authorizes you to hunt it before it does irreparable damage. - Blazej There Goes the Neighborhood 快気怪鳥の快進撃 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Yian Kut-Ku Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Plenty Reward : 33120z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Tempered Yian Kut-Ku Doshaguma , Lala Barina , Congalala , Rathian Description : A powerful Yian Kut-Ku has made itself at home in the Scarlet Forest! The good news: it looks to be thriving in its new territory. The bad news: its neighbors aren't so happy with what it's doing to the place. The Guild authorizes you to evict the squawking squatter before it causes any more damage - Kanya The Monkey King 調伏の獣 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Ajarakan Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Fallow Reward : 34200z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Tempered Ajarakan Gravios , Rompopolo , Rathian , Rathalos Description : A powerful Ajarakan was seen in the Oilwell Basin. With a monster running around like that so close to Azuz, something bad is bound to happen. You've been authorized to hunt it. Keep Azuz safe, Hunter. - Alma The White Wonder 白髭妍哉 Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Blangonga Location : Iceshard Cliffs Season : Fallow Reward : 33120z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Tempered Blangonga Hirabami pack, Nerscylla Description : A particularly powerful Blangonga has been sighted in the Iceshard Cliffs. Having a threat like that expand its territory might upset the balance of the ecosystem. You've been authorized to deal with this situation. - Alma Ultimate Berserker 暴れん坊、ここに極まれり Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Guardian Fulgur Anjanath Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Wakening Reward : 33480z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Tempered Guardian Fulgur Anjanath Guardian Doshaguma (2), Tempered Ajarakan Description : A powerful Guardian Fulgur Anjanath has been sighted in the Ruins of Wyveria, and may pose a threat to the Keepers. You've been authorized to hunt it before someone gets hurt. - Erik Planetes Protocol (Savage) 零式オメガ・プラネテス検証戦 Main Objective : Slay the Omega Planetes (Savage) Location : Rimechain Peak Season : N/A Reward : 36360z Time Limit : 35 mins. Requirements : HR100+, complete "Invader from the Stars" Monsters: Omega Planetes (Savage) None Description : Hmm... Omega Planetes was trying to evolve by gaining experience in battle with Jin Dahaad. You stopped him... But what if its analysis had been allowed to complete? This has given me an idea for a new song! - The Wandering Minstrel Notes : Rewards the Omega Data 2.0 to craft the Omega α Armor , &#160; True Omega's Sword , and &#160; True Omega's Rod . Rewards the FFXIV Manderville Mambo gesture on first completion. Be Cursed, Ye Shadowy Flame 闇き漁火よ、呪われてあれ Main Objective : Hunt the Arch-Tempered Nu Udra Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Firespring Reward : 34920z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Nu Udra Tempered Ajarakan , Gravios , Rathalos , Rompopolo Description : An extremely powerful Nu Udra has appeared in the Oilwell Basin, looking like a cursed flame burning at night. Only the most elite hunters could possibly be a match for it. May good fortune be with you as you aim to be one of those select few. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Nu Udra Certificate γ to craft the Udra γ Armor . Heart of Judecca ジュデッカの心臓 Main Objective : Slay the Arch-Tempered Jin Dahaad Location : Rimechain Peak Season : N/A Reward : 35640z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Jin Dahaad Hirabami (3) Description : An extremely powerful Jin Dahaad has been sighted at Rimechain Peak, ready to freeze the bodies and souls of those who enter the pit of its lair. May fortune favor the hunters who seek the summit beyond. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Jin Dahaad Certificate γ to craft the Dahaad γ Armor . 10 Star [ ] Hope of the Ancients 天人達のエルピス Main Objective : Slay the Zoh Shia Location : Dragontorch Shrine Season : N/A Reward : 47160z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Zoh Shia None Description : I may be a biologist, but even I can't help but be reduced to a layperson's vocabulary when I try to describe this... "existence." If we want even a hope at an answer, we have to investigate. Consider this my request. As a reward, you'll get items that can turn into powerful talismans. - Erik Special Assignment: Slay Gogmazios 特殊任務・ゴグマジオスの討伐 Main Objective : Slay the Gogmazios Location : Forgotten Machineworks Season : N/A Reward : 60120z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+, complete "Ghosts Pay No Heed to Tomorrow" Monsters: Gogmazios None Description : Gogmazios has returned. This quest is different from the previous Gogmazios assignment - we won't be able to provide the level of support you had before. That means the challenge is greater, but I know you'll give it everything you've got. Note: No Support Hunters will appear on the upper level. - Erik Just What the Doctor Ordered ププロポルは泣いてない Main Objective : Hunt the Tempered Rompopolo Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Plenty Reward : 35640z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Tempered Rompopolo Nu Udra , Ajarakan (2), Rathalos (2), Gravios Description : That one monster we hardly ever receive reports about... you know...the, uh, Romp...something? One is going on a rampage! You'll be rewarded with materials for a special piece of equipment and one of six kinds of decorations. - Kanya Notes : Rewards the Rompopolo Sketch to craft the Rompomask α . Rewards the Noxious Lantern pendant on first completion and rewards one of six Polo Pal pendants at random. Ruler of the Desert Kingdom 楼蘭の睥睨者 Main Objective : Hunt the Arch-Tempered Rey Dau Location : Windward Plains Season : Sandtide Reward : 40320z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Rey Dau Tempered Doshaguma pack, Tempered Balahara (2), Tempered Quematrice Description : One existence alone scowls over the desert from its high throne. A single glance is enough to cause any monster to shiver with existential fear - though maybe a hunter like you is unshakeable? Prove it, and you'll receive items that can turn into powerful talismans. - Cruz Notes : Rewards the Rey Dau Certificate γ to craft the Rey γ Armor . Summons from the Land Beyond トゥオネラの番人より告ぐ Main Objective : Hunt the Arch-Tempered Uth Duna Location : Scarlet Forest Season : Downpour Reward : 40320z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Uth Duna Tempered Rathalos , Tempered Yian Kut-Ku , Tempered Congalala , Tempered Lala Barina Description : We've discovered an unbelievable Uth Duna specimen. Make a single false move around it and you may as well say goodbye to the land of the living. But keep your feet on the ground and you'll be looking at some reward items that could turn into some mighty powerful talismans. - Quinn Notes : Rewards the Uth Duna Certificate γ to craft the Duna γ Armor . Scion of the Dark Cradle 黒き揺り篭の吾子 Main Objective : Hunt the Arch-Tempered Nu Udra Location : Oilwell Basin Season : Firespring Reward : 40320z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Nu Udra Tempered Ajarakan , Tempered Gravios , Tempered Rathalos , Tempered Rathian Description : We've countered the most dangerous Nu Udra to date. It lights up the Oilwell Basin as though it were a scion of the darkness itself, born from it, and burning like a torch in the blackness. Succeed in this hunt, and you'll be rewarded with items that can yield powerful talismans. - Hadewych Notes : Rewards the Nu Udra Certificate γ to craft the Udra γ Armor . Frozen Knells of the East 東方の鐘冴ゆ道は凍えけり Main Objective : Slay the Arch-Tempered Jin Dahaad Location : [Rimechain Peak]] Season : N/A Reward : 45000z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Jin Dahaad Hirabami (3) Description : We've laid eyes on a truly awe-inspiring specimen of the Iceshard Cliffs apex species. Its presence itself seems to ring out through the cliffs and the Eastlands, freezing listeners to their cores. Brave the cold, and you'll be rewarded with items that can turn into powerful talismans. - Blazej Notes : Rewards the Jin Dahaad Certificate γ to craft the Dahaad γ Armor . Freedom from Solitude 孤独から出でし君という自由 Main Objective : Hunt the Arch-Tempered Arkveld Location : Ruins of Wyveria Season : Wyvern's Wakening Reward : 43920z Time Limit : 50 mins. Requirements : HR100+ Monsters: Arch-Tempered Arkveld Tempered Guardian Rathalos , Tempered Guardian Fulgur Anjanath , Tempered Guardian Ebony Odogaron , Tempered Doshaguma Description : Arkveld is free of the chains that bound its species. And this offspring has overcome the solitude of the first Guardian Arkveld we knew, the White Wraith - yet it's inherited its indomitable spirit. Now, we must now do our duty as members of the expedition. - Alma Notes : Rewards the Arkveld Certificate γ to craft the Arkvulcan γ Armor .

# Ajarakan

Ajarakan アジャラカン &#160; (Ajarakan) Carves · Equipment · Gallery · Videos Ecology English Title Glowing Monkey Beast The Great Ape Japanese Title 赫猿獣 Chinese Name 赫猿兽 (Simplified) 赫猿獸 (Traditional) Korean Name 아자라칸 Korean Title 혁원수 General Information Monster Class Fanged Beast Elements Fire Ailments Fireblight Blastblight Weakest to Water Ice Habitat Oilwell Basin Ruins of Wyveria Wounded Hollow Bountiful Dunes Rococo Rocks Size 1,455.44 1,047.92 Related Monsters N/A Generation Sixth “ A fanged beast characterized by the flame-like protrusions that cover its back. A fanged beast that will scrape its claws against its metal-infused carapace to create a red-hot, molten-like effect. The region's greatest threat becomes active during the Firespring. „ Ajarakan is a Fanged Beast first introduced in Monster Hunter Wilds . Contents 1 Physiology 2 Behavior and Abilities 3 Game Data 4 Game Appearances 4.1 Main Series 4.2 Spin-offs 5 Materials 6 In-Game Description 7 Notes Physiology [ ] Ajarakan is a large Fanged Beast that resembles a Mandrill monkey and a baboon/gorilla hybrid in stance and appearance. Its body is covered in jagged, golden-green scales, with streaks of bright blue and red running across its face, chest, back and arms. Its forelimbs are larger and more muscular than its hindlimbs, much like most primate-like Fanged Beasts. However, Ajarakan's fingers do not have claws like the other primate Fanged Beasts, instead possessing flat fingernails, as well as thick gripping pads on the fingers and toes. Two rows of short crests emerge from its bear-like head, which also boasts a bright blue nose and a maw of sharp teeth. The protrusions on its back, shaped like billowing flames stand over the rest of its body, giving the beast a distinctive silhouette. Finally, its tail is long and thin, but culminates in a mass of rough, jagged spines. Behavior and Abilities [ ] Ajarakan is an aggressive monster that is quick to challenge other monsters such as Rompopolo in fights using its brute strength in battle to grapple opponents with, while also hurling chunks of burning rocks from the ground at hunters as projectiles. It is a strong, fast and agile monster like Rajang , as well as a great climber as seen when it climbs onto metal pipes and volcanic ledges with ease, and leaping from said structures to attack opponents from above. Ajarakan can ignite its metallic shell and armor with its tail, causing it to glow bright red with intense heat, increasing its attacks with fiery punches, it can even create waves and bursts of magma on the ground to attack with. If threatened enough, they can unleash an ultimate attack, they first spin in place to release explosive dust, then launch themselves into the air and then dive into their opponent to create a large fiery impact. Like other Fanged Beasts, they form large packs and cooperate with each other when hunting or defending themselves, however this does little against versatile apex predators such as Nu Udra that can easily take on several of the Great Apes at once. Main Series [ ] Monster Hunter Wilds (Introduced) Spin-offs [ ] Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection Materials [ ] Low-rank High-rank In-Game Description [ ] Monster Hunter Wilds Characteristic by their highly developed carapaces, Ajarakan wrap themselves in molten metal that they rub together to heat up and create explosions. Presumably due to the friction of the metal, they can reach high enough temperatures to melt even the ground or bullets. They can also use their strong limbs to grip onto the ceiling and move around freely, so a hunter must watch out from every angle, including above. Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection This Fanged Beast affixes molten metals to its carapace, and the friction resulting from those minerals rubbing together allows it to accumulate heat and cause explosions. Notes [ ] General General Notes Ajarakan has Turf Wars with Arkveld , Nu Udra , and Rompopolo . Ajarakan is the first Fanged Beast that can have its tail severed. Ajarakan can be power clashed by blocking its punches or slams. The people of Azuz simply refer to Ajarakan as "Great Apes" as they, like many cultures in the Forbidden Lands, do not give names to Monsters like the Guild does. Its Tempered form will always start out in its powered up state. ▷ Monsters appearing in Monster Hunter Wilds ( edit ) Herbivore &#160; Ceratonoth &#160; Dalthydon &#160; Rafma Neopteron &#160; # Arkveld

Arkveld アルシュベルド &#160; (Arushuberudo) Carves · Equipment · Gallery · Videos Ecology English Title Chain Blade Wyvern The White Wraith Radiant Cry of Life Ashen Blade Unearthed Japanese Title 鎖刃竜 白の孤影 Chinese Name 锁刃龙 (Simplified) 鎖刃龍 (Traditional) Chinese Title 白色孤影 (Simplified) 白之孤影 (Traditional) Korean Name 알슈베르도 Korean Title 쇄인룡 하얀 그림자 General Information Monster Class Flying Wyvern Elements Dragon Ailments Dragonblight Weakest to Dragon Habitat Windward Plains Scarlet Forest Oilwell Basin Iceshard Cliffs Ruins of Wyveria Wounded Hollow Sacrosanctum/Lazlion Size 2,083.17 1,483.22 Related Monsters Guardian Arkveld Generation Sixth Arkveld is a Flying Wyvern first introduced in Monster Hunter Wilds . Contents 1 Physiology 2 Behavior and Abilities 3 Game Appearances 3.1 Main Series 3.2 Spin Offs 4 Materials 4.1 High Rank 5 In-Game Description 6 Notes Physiology [ ] Arkveld is a large quadruped monster covered in grayish white scales, white fur, and armor plating. It has ram-like horns on each side of its head curving downward in a manner of tusks, a thick armored tail, a large plated lower jaw, and a mouth full of sharp teeth. Its head has plating that gives the impression of a helmet. Its feet are zygodactyl, with two toes facing forward and another two backwards. Similar to Berukyurosu , Arkveld's main feature are its clawed wings which have huge armored chain-like tendrils attached to them that can extend and retract at will. Unlike in Berukyurosu, where its "chains" are made out of elongated wing fingers, Arkveld's tendrils are made of two strands of tendon lined with arrays of bony structures attached to its wrists. Its wing membranes are relatively small and are also covered in white fur. Despite this, it is still capable of flight. Overall, its body structure is similar to that of Seregios . Behavior and Abilities [ ] Much of Arkveld's ecology is apparently a mystery as most of its kind are said to be extinct, but so far Arkveld appears to be a powerful, aggressive and nomadic monster. It can be seen attacking and challenging other apex predators like Rey Dau and Uth Duna in other habitats seemingly to siphon their energy, which it then converts into Dragon Element within its body for more power. Arkveld uses its flexible wing chains either to whip and strike at opponents and attack them at close range, or at a distance by extending its chain tendrils. It can grab and constrict opponents with its tendrils to pin them down before absorbing their energy, or striking them with a claw attack. Arkveld can also split these chained tendrils down the middle to create a second pair, and infuse them with dragon element to create explosive whip strikes and shockwaves. Arkveld can also retract its chain tendrils into large wingblades to smash and slash at enemies. Its tail is also flexible and extendable, which it uses to thrust at enemies behind itself. Arkveld is surprisingly nimble and acrobatic despite its large size, able to launch acrobatic whip strikes and fast aerial attacks in battle. It will additionally ram opponents with its horns, bite them with its powerful jaws, or swipe at them with its extendable tail. Arkveld also possesses the powerful Dragon Element. After converting the energy it absorbs into Dragon Element, it then unleashes it from the chainwhips into the ground to create massive explosions or imbues the chainwhip strikes. Notably, some Arkveld who have achieved the rare Arch Tempered State can transform into an enhanced state called Arkveld Unleashed . Notably, these Arkvelds can heal at a much faster rate, similar to the Guardian monsters . Notably, these versions are similar to the Guardian Arkveld but much stronger. In-Game Description [ ] Monster Hunter Wilds A flying wyvern that was considered extinct according to documents left behind by the Guild. Their wings have a unique, chain-like blade that can extend and retract freely to reap their prey. They feed on elemental energy absorbed through these chainblades, and are able to convert the energy to unleash dragon element attacks. Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection A Flying wyvern with chain-like wings that end in bladed tendrils. It can extend and retract these tendrils at will, dispatching prey with deadly efficiency. Notes [ ] General MHST3 General Notes Arkveld is the flagship monster of Monster Hunter Wilds . It is also, currently, the final boss of its base game High Rank storyline. Arkveld is the first Functionally Extinct Species encountered in-game in the Monster Hunter series. It is the only large monster in Wilds to appear in all locales as an invasive monster. Arkveld has a proper turf war with Rey Dau . Arkveld has an interaction with many elemental monsters where it will first topple the victim with standard attacks and then absorb its energy. Only when Arkveld begins absorbing the victim's energy will the "turf war" prompt appear. Despite not being elemental monsters, it has this interaction with Guardian Doshaguma and Gore Magala . Possibly because the former being a Guardian and the latter has the Frenzy Virus. Arkveld can be power clashed by blocking its bite or chainblade slams. It has a pin attack where it traps the hunter with its chain whips, and slams its other wingarm upon the victim. This can be interrupted by using any slinger ammo. Notably, the initial chainblade grab will drain the hunter's health. It is a mystery how Arkveld is able to fly, since its wing membrane seems to be just tufts of fur. Arkveld's weapons are named after the Knights of the Round Table from Arthurian mythos. The same holds true for its Guardian counterpart. When powered up, Arkveld's chainblades are depowered separate from each other by attacking them; depowering one causes it to stagger, and depowering both causes an extended knock down. Tempered Arkveld's chainblades will be powered up by default. Arch-Tempered Arkveld is very similar to Guardian Arkveld, having glowing veins and wylk explosions. It uses a different battle music, which is a remix of both its Guardian and Normal theme. It can spin drive its chainblade to create 4 explosive lines of Dragon element. Its multi-explosion attack, created from all 4 chainblades, now executes faster and has a wider range. It can regenerate its wounds faster than Guardians. Arch-Tempered Arkveld is the final monster to be added to the base game of Monster Hunter Wilds . Monster Hunter Stories 3 Its battle theme from Wilds plays for its boss fight. The boss version of Arkveld is much harder than Malzeno, and must have its ultimate attack interrupted by having Ratha use Savage Fireball while he has Attack Up (L) buffs. Doing so topples it and weakens it for a short time. Once done, a new battle music plays, which isn't as sorrowful as any of Arkveld's themes and noticeably epic. Just like Wilds, Arkveld was considered extinct, as stated from a side quest in Canalta. However, it isn't considered an endangered species. It's unknown whether Guardian Arkveld exist or not, or if some Arkvelds survive extinction just like Rathalos. ▷ Monsters appearing in Monster Hunter Wilds ( edit ) Herbivore &#160; Ceratonoth &#160; # Balahara

Balahara バーラハーラ &#160; (Bārahāra) Carves · Equipment · Gallery · Videos Ecology English Title Sand Sea Wyvern Japanese Title 沙海竜 Chinese Name 沙海龙 (Simplified) 沙海龍 (Traditional) Korean Name 발라하라 Korean Title 사해룡 General Information Monster Class Leviathan Elements Water Ailments Waterblight Weakest to Thunder Habitat Windward Plains Wounded Hollow Size 2,371.64 1,702.22 Related Monsters N/A Generation Sixth Balahara is a Leviathan first introduced in Monster Hunter Wilds . Contents 1 Physiology 2 Behavior and Abilities 3 Game Appearances 3.1 Main Series 4 Materials 5 In-Game Description Physiology [ ] Balahara is a supple, serpentine Leviathan with a body shape similar to Agnaktor and Lagiacrus . Its body is covered in small, brownish-gray scales that grow larger and sharper on its sides. It has four short legs and a long drill-like tail. The Balahara's most distinguishing feature is the unique shape of its head. Its tripartite jaws bear three tongues, and both its upper and lower jaws are covered in large amounts of sawblade-like teeth. The inside of its mouth emits a faint blue glow, and it has multiple pairs of tiny, scallop-like eyes lining its jaws. Also lining both sides at the base of the neck are shark-like gills. Behavior and Abilities [ ] Balahara is a desert-dwelling Leviathan that can deftly swim through the sand by using its tail like a drill. It creates quicksand traps to catch prey, a behavior that seems to be based on the hunting tactic of Antlions . Balahara can also work together in packs of 3 members to overwhelm larger monsters, such as Doshaguma , as shown in their turf war. It is also shown to be capable of clinging to walls and pillars and can spit a mud-like glob or stream of mud from its mouth. Game Appearances [ ] Click on Expand to see contents. Main Series [ ] Monster Hunter Wilds (Introduced) Materials [ ] Low Rank High Rank In-Game Description [ ] Monster Hunter Wilds Desert-dwelling leviathans that build carapaces out of the fulgurite formed by lightning strikes. They use their flexible skeletons and serpentine bodies to create quicksand traps for unwary prey. Inside their mouths are multiple eye-like sensory organs. The mucus they secrete contains luminous bacteria and is believed to aid visibility while they are submerged and other low-light conditions like sandstorms. Threat Level (危険度): ★-★★★★★ ▷ Monsters appearing in Monster Hunter Wilds ( edit ) Herbivore &#160; Ceratonoth &#160; Dalthydon &#160; Rafma Neopteron &#160; Bulaqchi &#160; Comaqchi &#160; Vespoid # Blangonga

Blangonga ドドブランゴ &#160; (Dodoburango) Carves · Equipment · Gallery · Videos Ecology English Title Snow Lion Japanese Title 雪獅子 Chinese Name 雪狮子王 General Information Monster Class Fanged Beast Elements Ice Ailments Iceblight (MHGen) Snowman Frostblight (6th Gen) Weakest to Fire Habitat Snowy Mountains Arctic Ridge Iceshard Cliffs Wounded Hollow Interceptor's Base Fortress Ruins Yilufa Snowy Mountains Glacial Valley Glacial Caps Old Capital Road Size 1221.2 791.12 Related Monsters Blango , Copper Blangonga , Flame Blangonga , Zenith Blangonga , Rajang , Furious Rajang , Conga , Congalala , Emerald Congalala , Gold Congalala , Garangolm Generation Second Blangonga is a Fanged Beast introduced in Monster Hunter 2 . Contents 1 Physiology 2 Abilities 3 Behavior 4 Habitat 5 Game Appearances 5.1 Main Series 5.2 Frontier 5.3 Spin-offs 6 Other Non-Subspecies Forms 6.1 Hard Core (HC) Blangonga 6.2 Zenith Blangonga 6.3 Flame Blangonga 7 In-Game Description 8 MHGen Breakable Parts 9 Notes Physiology [ ] As the alpha-male of the pack, the Blangonga is twice as large as the average Blango with a much more aggressive temperament. Its strong, muscled limbs allow it to run and leap at a startling speed, and its powerful roar can catch hunters unaware without adequate hearing protection . It has larger fangs and a bald forehead appearing as a bump. It has two large whiskers and two large protrusions on the side of its nose. Abilities [ ] By calling out to its pack, the Blangonga can summon Blangos to fight beside it in battle. Its deadly speed can bewilder the novice hunter, as they can perform a dive that can send them rolling into their foes and deal out massive damage. Blangongas can break ice at their feet and hurl it at hunters to inflict a Snowman status, or break it into ice shrapnel that can send foes flying. Behavior [ ] Blangongas are incredibly aggressive creatures. They will ruthlessly attack hunters and prey, yet shy away from anything larger than themselves. Habitat [ ] Blangonga live in cold habitats. Their thick coat keeps them warm and serves as the perfect camouflage. It's mostly native to the Arctic Ridge, until it appears recently in the Iceshard Cliffs. Game Appearances [ ] Click on Expand to see contents. Main Series [ ] Monster Hunter 2 (Introduced) Monster Hunter Freedom 2 Monster Hunter Freedom Unite Monster Hunter Generations Monster Hunter Generations Ultimate Monster Hunter Wilds Frontier [ ] Monster Hunter Frontier Monster Hunter Frontier Season 2.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 3.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 4.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 5.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 6.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 7.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 8.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 9.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 10 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.1 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.2 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.3 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.4 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.5 Monster Hunter Frontier G Monster Hunter Frontier G2 Monster Hunter Frontier G3 Monster Hunter Frontier G Genuine Monster Hunter Frontier G5 Monster Hunter Frontier G6 Monster Hunter Frontier G7 Monster Hunter Frontier G8 Monster Hunter Frontier G9 Monster Hunter Frontier G10 Monster Hunter Frontier Z Monster Hunter Frontier Z Zenith Spin-offs [ ] Monster Hunter Online Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection Other Non-Subspecies Forms [ ] Hard Core (HC) Blangonga [ ] HC Blangonga appears quite different to the usual Blangonga. The traditionally orange features on its face are instead bright shiny red, whilst the head-cone is larger and a deeper blue. New attacks include a triple ice throw, greater ice breath with exceptional range and fast, well-aimed digging attacks. Zenith Blangonga [ ] Main Article: Zenith Blangonga A Zenith Species of Blangonga first appearing in Monster Hunter Frontier Z . Flame Blangonga [ ] Main Article: Flame Blangonga A Lone Species of Blangonga first appearing in Monster Hunter Online . In-Game Description [ ] Monster Hunter Freedom 2 / Monster Hunter Freedom Unite Leader of a Blango pack, it is twice as large and recognized by its giant fangs, whiskers, and head-crown. It sends its pack to attack any trespassers. Its jumping power allows it great mobility in its home range of the snowy mountains. Monster Hunter Generations Leader of a Blango pack, it is twice as large and recognized by its giant fangs and whiskers. It sends its pack to attack any trespassers. Its jumping power allows it great mobility in its home range of the Arctic Ridge. Threat Level (危険度): ★★★★ Monster Hunter Wilds Large, white fanged beasts that rule over other Blango, attacking intruders as a pack. Its muscularity and mobility allows it to strike swiftly, even on fresh snow, and pounce from a long distance—so hunters with long-range weapons still need to stay on guard. Large tusks are the mark of a powerful leader. Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection This Blango pack leader is found on snowy peaks and is recognizable by its giant fangs and whiskers. Twice as large as a Blango, it has far greater strength and mobility. Monster Hunter Frontier G (?) Monster Hunter Online 分类 牙兽种。 生境范围 在伊鲁法雪山地区大量栖息，肉食性的凶猛群居怪物。 生态位 在牙兽种之中，雪狮子被视为具有最强的协同性和群居本能，特别是领袖的威望尤其深厚，并且族群之中似乎存在某种“亲族”的纽带，这使得雪狮子之间具有类似“羁绊”的关系，同族极少发生血战，若是同时存在复数的强大雪狮子，其会根据实力进行排行，共同统治与守护族群。据说，整个伊鲁法雪山地区虽然具有多个雪狮子群落，但所有聚群都具有一个统一的“大头领”，当地的人们敬畏地称呼其“白王”。 适应性 雪狮子不仅能在雪地上敏捷地跳跃，而且能够潜入厚雪中并自由移动。覆盖全身长毛具有相当的硬度，不仅能够保暖，一定程度上能起到铠甲的作用，这也使得他们成为当之无愧的雪山强者。作为族群中的王者，他那硕大的体格和气派的胡须都显示出领袖的威严，那两根无法收入口中的巨大牙齿就是王者的象征，失去了牙齿就等于失去了王的地位。而获得这两根牙齿的猎人，则能够成就英雄的美名。 行为 雪狮子不仅具有牙兽种典型的强劲力量，头脑也非常聪明，懂得利用雪原的环境来伏击被他们认为“强大”的猎人。有足够的事例证明，雪狮子王会组织种群捕获猎物，雪狮子们向敌人投掷雪球、躲开攻击等动作，让他们看起来简直就像经过严格操练的士兵。 Threat Level (危険度): !!!! MHGen Breakable Parts [ ] Fangs (x1) Tail (x1) Notes [ ] General MHGen MHWilds Frontier MHO General Notes Blangonga's fangs and tail can be broken. The fangs can only be broken with Fire Element. Breaking its fangs will also cause its Roar to become ineffective and it will no longer summon Blangos . Another weakness sign signalling a capture that a Blangonga shows is that, its cheek will turn from light blue to dark blue. To make a Blangonga drop a shiny, stay in the same area as him without being noticed. After some time, he will stop and dig the snow, dropping the item right after. Blangonga has the habit of 'cleaning/rubbing' his face, doing so will remove the tracking effect of a Paintball. When a Blangonga summons a Blango , the Blango has a new ability. It can throw snowballs or ice balls at hunters, but since it is the smaller version of the Blangonga's ice floor throw, it won't activate the Snowman status effect. Blangos summoned by a Blangonga disappear if the area is left and re-entered. However, Blangos that were originally there will remain unless killed. Blangonga's roar requires Earplugs to block. Blangonga's tremors requires Tremor Res +1 to block. Blangonga was voted 190th place in the Hunters' Choice for Top Monster during Monster Hunter's 20th Anniversary. &#91; 1 &#93; &#160; It shares this placement with Purple Ludroth . Monster Hunter Generations Fire element is no longer required to break its fangs. Monster Hunter Wilds Blangonga can be power clashed by blocking its arm sweeps. Its animation having it push against the hunter's weapon is a near perfect copy of a similar action during Dos's opening cinematic, which was the direct inspiration for the concept of power clashes. It has a turf war with Hirabami . It can now inflict Frostblight, presumably to make up for the loss of the Snowman status. It gains a new sweeping ice breath. Focus striking its rear during this attack will stagger it. Blangonga's fangs can now break twice. Breaking its fangs no longer stops its ability to roar, but it will decrease the effectiveness of its ice breath. It has a new roar. Monster Hunter Frontier Blangonga can be a pet. It is shown that Blangonga will eat Amber Ore surprisingly. HC Blangonga's roar requires HG Earplugs to block. # Chatacabra

Chatacabra チャタカブラ &#160; (Chatakabura) Carves · Equipment · Gallery · Videos Ecology English Title Cladding Frog Japanese Title 纏蛙 Chinese Name 缠蛙 (Simplified) 纏蛙 (Traditional) Korean Name 차타카브라 Korean Title 전와 General Information Monster Class Amphibian Elements None Ailments None Weakest to Ice Thunder Habitat Windward Plains Wounded Hollow Broadleaf Basin Ashen Pass Bountiful Dunes Size 617.89 443.48 Related Monsters N/A Generation Sixth Chatacabra is an Amphibian first introduced in Monster Hunter Wilds . Contents 1 Physiology 2 Behavior and Abilities 3 Game Appearances 3.1 Main Series 3.2 Spin-offs 4 Materials 5 In-Game Description 6 Notes Physiology [ ] Chatacabra is an Amphibian with incredibly strong forelimbs. Its ape-like posture and way of locomotion are akin to a simian Fanged Beast , most notably a Rajang . Its body is covered in rigid turquoise scales, with black patterns all over. It has a spiky lower jaw reminiscent of a Deviljho , and in its maw hides a long massive tongue. Behavior and Abilities [ ] Chatacabra uses its long tongue to whip at enemies and to lick its own forelimbs, covering them in its own saliva. This saliva has adhesive qualities, allowing stone or other earthen materials to be affixed to its forelimbs, thus strengthening the monster even more by giving it more armor and increasing the power of its punches. Chatacabra also likes to charge at enemies with its mouth wide open. Game Appearances [ ] Click on Expand to see contents. Main Series [ ] Monster Hunter Wilds (Introduced) Spin-offs [ ] Monster Hunter Now Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection Materials [ ] Low-rank High-rank In-Game Description [ ] Monster Hunter Wilds Amphibians that use their long tongues to seize and devour prey such as Bulaqchi. Their evolved forelimbs store a sticky mucus-like substance. When agitated, Chatacabra rub their forelimbs against the ground to collect stone and ore, widening the range and destructiveness of their blows. Monster Hunter Now This amphibian monster uses its long tongue to lick and eat a wide variety of things. Its well-developed forelegs retain a sticky mucus that causes stones and sand to adhere to its body when it rubs them along the ground. This drastically increases the range and power of its attacks. Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection Using its long tongue, this Amphibian can grab objects and food from a distance. Its adhesive saliva can also be used to attach rocks and debris to its forelegs, enhancing its combat abilities. Notes [ ] General MHNow MHST3 General Notes The name Chatacabra likely derives from chattaan (चट्टान), meaning "rock" in Hindi, and shares the same second half with Tetsucabra . However, even though they belong in same classification, their close relation with each other has yet to be confirmed. Similar to Nibelsnarf it will 'eat' barrel bombs in its path while it is charging, causing them to explode in its mouth. Chatacabra can be power clashed by blocking its arm slams or charge. The people of Kunafa simply refer to Chatacabra as "Giant Toads" as they, like many cultures in the Forbidden Lands, do not give names to Monsters like the Guild does. Monster Hunter Now TBA Monster Hunter Stories 3 It is the first Feral monster fought in the game, utilizing Zinogre's Fulgurbug attack. ▷ Monsters appearing in Monster Hunter Wilds ( edit ) Herbivore # Congalala

Congalala ババコンガ &#160; (Babakonga) Carves · Equipment · Gallery · Videos Ecology English Name Congalala English Title Pink Fur Beast Japanese Title 桃毛獣 Chinese Name 桃毛兽王 (Simplified) 桃毛獸王 (Traditional) Korean Name 바바콩가 Korean Title 도모수 General Information Monster Class Fanged Beast Elements Fire (Specific Food Eaten) Ailments Fireblight (4th Gen) Sleep Soiled Poison Paralysis Blastblight (4th Gen Onward) (Specific Food Eaten) Weakest to Fire Habitat Old Jungle Old Swamp Jungle Swamp Sunken Hollow Primal Forest Heaven's Mount Everwood Jurassic Frontier Marshlands Ruined Pinnacle Scarlet Forest Ruins of Wyveria Wounded Hollow Flower Field Fortress Ruins Kumbel Wetlands Esther Lake Babda Rainforest Peculiar Den Loloska Size 1670.76 491.40 Related Monsters Conga Emerald Congalala Gold Congalala Blango Blangonga Copper Blangonga Rajang Furious Rajang Garangolm Generation Second Congalala is a Fanged Beast introduced in Monster Hunter 2 . Contents 1 Physiology 2 Behavior 3 Habitat 4 Other Non-Subspecies Forms 4.1 Hard Core (HC) Congalala 4.2 Gold Congalala 4.3 Congalajang 5 Game Appearances 5.1 Main Series 5.2 Frontier 5.3 Spin-offs 5.4 Crossovers 6 In-Game Description 7 Analysis and Guides 8 MH4U Breakable Parts 9 Notes Physiology [ ] It resembles a giant, tailed gorilla with pink fur, a hippo-like head, and long front claws. The spike on its head is actually hair that the Congalala has smoothed into shape to signify that they are the pack leader. Congalalas are surprisingly intelligent beasts. Behavior [ ] Despite their apparently adorable appearance, under no circumstances whatsoever should the Congalalas be underestimated. While they are for the most part very docile, they react well to the presence of herbivores, so long as they give a wide berth. They can quickly become aggressive to anything that disrupts feeding or startles them, for example, if they see hunters. When damaged enough, their rage mode is triggered. Most of their upper jaw will be red, as will their backside, which also discharges fart gas, and their aggression increases significantly. They are shown to be heavy sleepers, as even pulling on the creature's different parts of their body doesn't wake it up, unless they sneeze, are damaged, or hear loud roars. They tend to fart at any threats before fleeing or fighting. Habitat [ ] Congalala reside primarily in&#160;areas such as&#160;the Jungle , Old Jungle and&#160; Swamp , as well as the&#160; Primal Forest , Heaven's Mount ,&#160;and Sunken Hollow . Their MHST counterparts are found in Peculiar Den . In MH Wilds their preferred habitat is the Scarlet Forest , notably in an area full of honey. Other Non-Subspecies Forms [ ] Hard Core (HC) Congalala [ ] In Season 8.0, HC Congalala is introduced. It has a new move where it can hurl several large pieces of dung. [1] HC Congalala also has a new attack; it will jump and hit the ground, releasing an enormous gas cloud, bounce and repeat, bounce and repeat again. After that, it will spend a moment recovering. HC Congalala has the ability release gas so strong that it causes dragon strength wind every time around it, knocking hunters to the ground. Gold Congalala [ ] Main Article: Gold Congalala A Lone Species of Congalala first appearing in Monster Hunter Online . Congalajang [ ] Monster Hunter Online introduced an April Fools quest with a Congalala as the target. This Congalala shows no odd signs initially, but upon entering Abnormal State it assumes the skeleton, animations, moveset and theme of Rajang will exactly fight and act like a Rajang. Game Appearances [ ] Click on Expand to see contents. Main Series [ ] Monster Hunter 2 (Introduced) Monster Hunter Freedom 2 Monster Hunter Freedom Unite Monster Hunter 4 Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate Monster Hunter Generations Ultimate Monster Hunter Wilds Frontier [ ] Monster Hunter Frontier (Introduced) Monster Hunter Frontier Season 2.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 3.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 4.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 5.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 6.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 7.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 8.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 9.0 Monster Hunter Frontier Season 10 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.1 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.2 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.3 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.4 Monster Hunter Frontier Forward.5 Monster Hunter Frontier G Monster Hunter Frontier G2 Monster Hunter Frontier G3 Monster Hunter Frontier G Genuine Monster Hunter Frontier G5 Monster Hunter Frontier G6 Monster Hunter Frontier G7 Monster Hunter Frontier G8 Monster Hunter Frontier G9 Monster Hunter Frontier G10 Monster Hunter Frontier Z Monster Hunter Frontier Z Zenith Spin-offs [ ] Monster Hunter Online Monster Hunter Stories Monster Hunter Stories 2: Wings of Ruin Monster Hunter Spirits Crossovers [ ] TEPPEN In-Game Description [ ] Monster Hunter Freedom 2 / Monster Hunter Freedom Unite A large pelagus sporting pink fur often spotted in the jungle and swamp zones. Fond of mushrooms, its diet affects its breath, which may be poisonous or flaming. One can predict these traits via the food in its local habitat. Monster Hunter 4 ピンクの毛並みをもつ大型の牙獣。 温暖、湿潤な地域での目撃例が多い。 食欲旺盛で、特にキノコ類には目がなく、自ら持ち歩く事も。 食物によって吐く息が変わり、毒や炎など、様々な特性を持つ、生息地によって食物が異なるため、息も地域の影響を受ける。 Threat Level (危険度): ★★★★ Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate A large fanged beast with pink fur, often found in warm, damp regions. Fond of mushrooms, Congalalas possess either poisonous or flaming breath, depending on the food available in their local habitat. Threat Level (危険度): ★★★★ Monster Hunter XX (?) Threat Level (危険度): ★★★★ Monster Hunter Wilds Large fanged beasts with pink fur and a distinct crest, which the male shapes with plant oils and juices as a sign of virility. Congalala are common in temperate forests and are therefore well researched. They're big eaters and love mushrooms, which they absorb and then exhale as a variety of potent breaths that inflict poison, blast, paralysis, and more. Monster Hunter Stories Pink-furred Fanged Beasts. They let rip with almighty farts, the stench of which overwhelms opponents. Monster Hunter Stories 2: Wings of Ruin Large, pink-furred Fanged Beasts with an incredible appetite - especially for mushrooms, which the monster often carries around with them. They let rip the most almighty farts, the stench of which overwhelms opponents. Monster Hunter Frontier G (?) Monster Hunter Online 分类 牙兽种。 生境范围 常见于温暖地区的怪物。习性非常的好斗和贪吃，依靠蛮力抢夺食物或者单纯宣泄暴力地攻击其他生物的报告屡见不鲜。 生态位 桃毛兽王嗜食“瓦斯蘑菇”，大量食用后就会在剧烈运动时放出恶臭的屁，经常依靠这种臭气熏天的战斗方式抢占其他生物的地盘。 适应性 桃毛兽群由一名体型特别巨大的“王”所领导，作为桃毛兽王的招牌就是头上那撮显眼的艳丽毛发，是以植物汁液和自己的利爪专心梳理而成的，桃毛兽中领袖的证明。一只桃毛兽如果擅自梳理出这样的发型就是对自己群落老大的挑衅，往往会引发一场恶斗。 行为 当桃毛兽王感到威胁时，会选择叫喊或是直立晃动身体，以恐吓对手。如果敌人因为害怕逃走时，他们就会采取跳跃攻击。最令人感到恐惧的还是他们的恶臭气味，将自己腹内积蓄的食物之精华化作可怕的黄色气体放出，不管是从前方还是后方放出的——不甚吸入后都会全身不适。因此，对阵桃毛兽王，必须携带消臭玉已然成为猎人中的基本常识。 Threat Level (危険度): !! Analysis and Guides [ ] For details on older games this monster has appeared in, see Congalala Guides . MH4U Breakable Parts [ ] Comb (x1) Claws (x1) Tail (x1) Notes [ ] General MHF2 MH4U MHWilds Frontier MHO MHST2 General Notes Congalala was voted 122nd place in the Hunters' Choice for Top Monster during Monster Hunter's 20th Anniversary. &#91; 1 &#93; It primarily uses melee attacks, such as charges or swipes, with an occasional belly flop. Without the ESP skill , when the Congalala inflates its stomach, all attacks aimed at its stomach will bounce. However, it can be attacked from the side or the rear. The Congalala's signature move is its fart attack, which inflicts the Stench status, preventing the hunter from consuming any food items unless they use a Deodorant or wait for the status to pass. This abnormal status can be rendered useless with the armour skill 'Antiseptic'. The Congalala can also breathe flames, poison, paralysis or sleep gas out in front of it in the same fashion as Teostra or Lunastra using their fire breath. What it breathes depends on what it ate. If it did not eat anything specific, it will release fart fumes. The Congalala also has an extremely dangerous combo in which it swipes the ground 3 times and then does a body slam; however, this attack leaves it temporarily open to attacks, as long as the quake is avoided. The quake can be blocked against or rendered useless altogether with the skill Quake Resistance. When enraged, its face and butt cheeks turn red, and it angrily blasts a fart. In rage mode, it is both faster and stronger. The Congalala's weakspot, the head, will yield Vibrant Pelt when broken, and the remaining scraps of hair effectively make it look like a giant Conga with claws. If the hunter drops meat mid-battle, Congalala may stop to eat it. This trait can be utilised by dropping drugged, tainted and poisoned meat. The Congalala indicates that it is going for the meat when it stands on its hind legs and sniffs the air. It may take more than one meat to inflict the desired effect. Congalala is found in much the same habitats as its stronger relative, the Emerald Congalala . When hungry, the Congalala can release a sonic fart. This fart will actually have the same effect as a roar, but can be avoided by keeping a safe distance, blocking or the Earplugs skill. Congalala is able to use a Dung Throw attack. One chunk of dung is sent flying a short distance, and if the hunter is hit, it will inflict the Soiled status. To keep a Congalala from using its Dung Throw attack, simply do not break its tail. As long as the mushroom, ore, or bone is held in its tail, it cannot throw dung at the hunter. An interesting thing to note is that Congalala falls face-first into a Pitfall Trap, unlike most monsters whose heads are caught above ground. Congalala have been known to fart when caught in a Pitfall Trap; consider keeping a safe distance away. It is especially likely when they are in Rage mode. After dying, a Congalala can still damage any hunters nearby if they are standing near its claws while flailing its arms around. Monster Hunter Freedom 2 Congalala's tail can be broken and will yield Territorial Dung or Territorial Dung+ (High ranking quests only), account items worth 500 Pokke Points and 2500 Pokke Points each, respectively. Monster Hunter 4 Ultimate It can become infected by the Frenzy Virus . When low on stamina it will fail to do its breath attacks and will take longer to do its fart attacks. It eats mushrooms to recover stamina. It's also the only monster that roars when it's out of stamina. It can now inflict Blastblight by eating Nitroshrooms. However it can only cause Blastblight through its farts and not its breath attack, which does fire damage like it has in previous games. Congalala gets a new super breath attack that has longer range than the normal one. It is possible for Congalala to be in Rage mode when it is encountered; this is most likely due to it being attacked by smaller monsters such as Remobra . In G Rank, it can hang on vines and move forward while constantly releasing fart attacks. Monster Hunter Wilds Its status breath attacks now act differently; for example its blast breath causes a line of explosions in front of it, its poison breath is a short burst released after it leaps towards a hunter, and its paralysis breath is a cone shaped area of effect in front of the monster. It can also retain multiple effects at once rather than one at a time. Congalala can either grab new mushrooms from nearby plants or dig them up. In the latter, if it is flinched before it can eat the mushroom, it will drop the Truffle Du Conga cooking ingredient. They can steal one of the hunter's mushrooms if the hunter has any. Tempered Congalala will start out with multiple mushroom effects already active. Monster Hunter Frontier Congalala can be a pet. If you feed your pet Congalala certain items before battle it will start with Sleep, Poison or Paralysis breath (for example feeding it sleep herbs will give it sleep breath). HC Congalala's roar requires HG Earplugs to block. Monster Hunter Online This monster is unlocked at Level 18. Monster Hunter Stories 2 Congalala is a Technical type monster. Opposing Congalalas turn to Power attacks when enraged. Congalala is often accompanied by Conga. Breaking Congalala’s head with a Hammer will boost its retreat rate. ▷ Monsters appearing in Monster Hunter 2 ( edit ) Herbivore &#160; Anteka &#160; Aptonoth &#160; Apceros &#160; Kelbi &#160;
